title: Content & Operations Assistant
description:
???? About the Role



We are a high-end residential design and construction company based in Sydney, focused on delivering architecturally driven homes.



We are building a strong content and marketing presence across platforms such as YouTube and LinkedIn, alongside improving internal systems and operational efficiency.



This role sits across content production, marketing coordination, and business operations support, and is ideal for someone who is organised, proactive, and comfortable working across multiple areas.



???? Role Overview



You will be responsible for managing and executing our content workflow, while also supporting the sales and marketing functions of the business.



This is not just a “VA role” — it is a key support position that helps drive marketing output, maintain systems, and improve efficiency across the business.



???? Key Responsibilities

Content Production & Management (Primary Focus)

Edit long-form YouTube videos (clean, professional style)

Cut 5–10 short-form clips from each video

Add captions and basic formatting to videos

Upload and schedule content across:

YouTube

LinkedIn

Instagram


Organise and manage all media files (video, images, project content)

Turn raw site content (photos/videos from team) into usable posts

?? Content Coordination & Copy Support

Assist in creating captions and posts using provided frameworks (ChatGPT supported)

Format LinkedIn posts in a professional, high-end tone

Maintain a content calendar and ensure consistent posting

???? Sales & Marketing Support

Assist with CRM updates and basic admin tasks

Support sales team with document preparation and follow-ups

Coordinate with external marketing partners (as required)

Upload and manage marketing assets

?? General Operations Support

Assist with ad hoc tasks across the business

Help organise internal systems and workflows

Manage task tracking via project management tools (e.g. ClickUp)

???? Skills & Experience

Required:

Experience with video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro or similar)

Strong organisational skills

Good written English

Comfortable using digital tools and systems

Ability to follow structured processes and meet deadlines

Preferred (but not essential):

Experience with social media scheduling tools

Familiarity with LinkedIn content

Experience working with content creators or agencies

Basic understanding of construction or real estate (not required)

???? What We’re Looking For

Highly organised and detail-oriented

Proactive — able to take ownership of tasks

Able to follow systems and improve them over time

Interested in long-term growth within the role

Comfortable working in a fast-moving environment

???? What This Role Offers

Flexible remote work

Opportunity to grow into a larger role as the business scales

Exposure to high-end residential projects and marketing

Direct involvement in building a strong brand presence

title: Content / Reel editor
description:
Videographer / Reel Editor (Cinematic + Structured Content)



I’m looking for a high-level videographer/editor to take raw footage and turn it into cinematic, high-performing Instagram reels.



You’ll be responsible for transforming unedited clips into clean, engaging, structured content that holds attention and looks premium.



What I need:



Turn raw footage into cinematic-style reels (clean cuts, smooth transitions, strong pacing)

Add subtitles, hooks, and on-screen text that improve retention

Structure content so it flows naturally (hook ? build ? payoff ? CTA)

Use sound design, music, and effects to enhance impact (not overdo it)

Maintain a consistent brand style and aesthetic

Deliver content optimized for Instagram performance



The style I’m after:



Cinematic but not over-edited

Clean, sharp, and intentional

Strong focus on storytelling + viewer retention

Inspired by high-level fitness/business creators (not generic CapCut edits)



High amount of knowledge around captions 



Ideal person:



Has experience editing short-form content (Reels/TikTok)

Understands what makes people stop scrolling

Can take minimal direction and still produce quality work

Fast turnaround and consistent output



If this is you, send through examples of your work (especially reels), and we’ll go from there.

title: Part-Time Video Editor for Educational YouTube Channel
description:
I’m looking for a skilled video editor to help edit educational YouTube videos.



This is part-time but consistent work, 1–2 long-form videos per month to start, with potential for more if it’s a good fit.



About the videos

The videos are educational, but they need to feel engaging, modern, and well-paced rather than slow or corporate.



I’m looking for someone who can make videos feel:



clear

dynamic

visually engaging

polished and professional



This role is for someone who can follow direction well and also bring strong editing instincts to the table.



Requirements:

At least 4 years of video editing experience

Must use Adobe Premiere Pro

Do not apply if you use CapCut or any software other than Premiere Pro

Must own a reliable computer

Must speak conversational English

Must be able to follow instructions closely

Must be able to meet deadlines consistently

Must have experience editing for YouTube





Hiring process:

Phase 1:  Message me your CV and a short cover letter. Please start your application with the words: Premiere Pro editor



Phase 2: Only candidates who seem like a strong fit will be invited to complete a short editing test using around 1 minute of footage.



Pay:

$75–$150 USD per long-form video, depending on complexity, quality, and turnaround time. Most videos will be paid within this range, with final pay depending on the scope of the edit.

title: Project-Based GoHighLevel CRM & Automation Specialist
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)

Job Type: Part-time, project-based

Compensation: Based on skill and experience; starting range can be discussed, with an initial approved hour cap



About the role



I am looking for an experienced GoHighLevel CRM & Automation Specialist to help set up the backend system for my real estate business.



This is not a full-time marketing manager role. I am not looking for someone to run all of my marketing strategy, social media, or branding.



I need someone who can build a clean and effective GoHighLevel system so my leads are captured, tracked, followed up with, nurtured, and moved toward appointments.



I do not have the time to learn and build the system myself, so I need someone who already understands GoHighLevel and can set it up properly.



What I need



I need help setting up the core GoHighLevel system for:



CRM/contact organization

lead pipeline stages

forms

calendars

workflow automations

/SMS follow-up

lead tracking

simple reporting

documentation

Main responsibilities

Set up GoHighLevel core account structure

Organize contacts, tags, and segmentation

Build one main lead pipeline

Set up one or more lead capture forms

Set up one appointment booking calendar

Create workflow automations for lead follow-up

Set up basic
 and/or SMS sequences

Connect forms, pipeline, and calendar where appropriate

Test the system to make sure it works properly

Document the setup so it is easy to use afterward

Initial scope of work



The first phase of this project should include:



CRM and contact organization

Create a clean structure for contacts

Set up tags and basic segmentation

Lead pipeline



Build one main pipeline with stages such as:



New lead

Contacted

Qualified

Appointment set

Nurture

Active client

Closed

Lost

Lead capture

Build at least one lead capture form

Make sure submissions flow correctly into GoHighLevel

Calendar

Set up one consultation booking calendar

Connect it to the rest of the system as needed

Automations



Set up core workflows such as:



immediate lead response

follow-up after form submission

appointment reminders

simple nurture sequence

Documentation

Provide simple SOP notes or documentation explaining how the system works

What I am looking for



I want someone who is a hands-on builder, not someone who only speaks in general marketing terms.



You should be able to:



think through a clean system

build it correctly

explain your work clearly

work independently

communicate well

stay within scope

Required skills

Strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel

Experience setting up:

CRM/contact systems

pipelines/opportunities

workflows/automations

calendars

forms/surveys

 and SMS sequences

tags and segmentation

Good English comprehension

Good communication

Strong organization

Ability to work asynchronously and independently

Nice to have

Experience with real estate businesses

Experience with lead-generation systems

Experience documenting SOPs or training tea
mbers

Experience with appointment booking workflows

This role is NOT for



Please do not apply if you are mainly:



a general social media manager

a broad marketing manager

a content creator without strong GoHighLevel setup skills

someone who is brand new to GoHighLevel



This role is specifically for someone who can set up the system correctly.



Work style



This is a remote role with a time-zone difference, so I need someone who is comfortable working asynchronously.



That means you should be able to:



work independently

communicate progress clearly

follow instructions

ask smart questions when needed

stay organized without constant live supervision

Project terms



This is a project-based setup role, not a permanent full-time role.



The project will begin with:



a short review of my needs

your recommended setup plan

an estimated number of hours

an initial approved hour cap



Additional hours must be approved before continuing.



There may be future as-needed work after the initial setup is complete, but this role is primarily for setup and documentation.



To apply, send:

A short introduction

Your GoHighLevel experience

Examples of GoHighLevel systems you have built

What parts of GoHighLevel you are strongest in

Whether you have built pipelines, forms, calendars, workflows, and automations

Whether you have worked with real estate or lead-generation businesses

Your hourly rate

Your estimated hours for a basic setup like this



Put the word "Pipeline" in your subject line so I know you read the full post

Screening question



Please answer this in your application:



If you were setting up GoHighLevel for a real estate business from scratch, what are the first 5 things you would build, and why?

title: URGENT! We're Hiring: Media Buyer (min 3-5 years exp)
description:
Hey there ????



We're Redfern Media (
) and Fractional CMO (
) — a direct response digital marketing agency that's been helping businesses grow for almost two decades. We've been featured in Forbes, Inc., Time, The New York Times, The Washington Post, CNN, Good Morning America, and more, and we've worked with clients like Daymond John (Shark Tank), Dr. Benjamin Hardy, and Alex Epstein.



We're not a media buying agency — we're a full-service direct response shop. Our clients come to us for the whole picture: website development, branding and design, paid ads, SEO,
 automation, calendar automation, Google My Business, voi
 automation, and marketing consultation. On top of that, we run coaching, consultation, and membership programs through Fractional CMO that teach business owners how to build their own marketing engines.

Paid ads are a core part of what we deliver — and that's where you come in.



Who we're looking for

We're adding a full-time Media Buyer to our team to own paid ad campaigns across Meta, Google, LinkedIn, and TikTok for our clients. You'll work alongside our account managers, designers, copywriters, developers, and strategists to build campaigns that actually move the needle — not just rack up impressions.

Because we're a direct response agency, every campaign you run is measured by one thing: did it generate leads, sales, or revenue? If you geek out over CPL, ROAS, and conversion rates more than vanity metrics, you'll fit right in here.



We love AI — and we want you to, too ????

This is important: we're an AI-forward team. We expect everyone on our team to use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and the like) to work smarter, faster, and better every single day. Whether it's speeding up research, drafting ad copy, analyzing performance data, building reports, auditing accounts, or brainstorming creative angles — if AI can help you do it better, we want you using it.



If you're someone who's still resistant to AI, this probably isn't the right fit. But if you've already built AI into your workflow and you're constantly looking for new ways to leverage it, you're going to love it here.

What you'll actually do



Research and strategy (before anything launches)

Research the client's market, audience, and competitors before drafting any campaign

Use AI tools to accelerate market research, audience analysis, and competitive intelligence

Study what's working in the niche using Meta Ad Library, Google Ads Transparency Center, TikTok Creative Center, and similar tools

Build creative swipe files and identify winning hooks, angles, and formats

Write clear strategic briefs that explain why we're running a campaign a certain way

Analyze the client's offer, funnel, and landing pages before recommending an ad spend



Auditing (a major part of the role)

Audit new client ad accounts top to bottom — structure, spend efficiency, wasted budget, naming conventions, and account health

Audit tracking setups: pixels, Conversions API, GTM, UTMs, custom conversions, and attribution

Audit performance data to find what's working, what's broken, and what to fix first

Audit landing pages and funnels for conversion friction

Flag compliance issues, especially in regulated niches like financial services and health



Campaign execution

Build and launch campaigns on Meta, Google, LinkedIn, and TikTok

Install and troubleshoot Meta Pixel, Google Tag, LinkedIn Insight Tag, and Conversions API

Set up Business Managers, ad accounts, and resolve restrictions when they pop up

Build lead forms and connect them to client CRMs (GoHighLevel, Google Sheets, etc.)

Write ad copy and creative briefs for our designers and video editors (AI-assisted is encouraged)



Optimization and scaling

Monitor campaigns daily, pause underperformers, and scale winners

Run A/B tests on creatives, audiences, and offers

Diagnose underperformance and actually fix it (not just report it)

Manage budget pacing across multiple accounts



Reporting and communication

Pull weekly performance reports and build client dashboards (we use Agency Analytics)

Translate data into plain-English insights clients and account managers can actually use

Coordinate daily with our team via Basecamp — clear writing matters here

Occasionally support our Fractional CMO coaching members with paid ad questions



What we're looking for

Minimum 3-5 years of hands-on media buying experience

Hands-on experience running Meta Ads is a must

Experience with at least one of: Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, or TikTok Ads (bonus if all three)

You actively use AI tools in your daily workflow and are excited to push that further

Comfortable with pixel installation, GTM, and tracking troubleshooting

You can audit an ad account and tell us what's wrong with it in 30 minutes

You actually enjoy research — competitor analysis, creative research, audience digging

Strong direct response instincts (you understand the difference between branding and direct response)

Strong writing skills — you'll write briefs, ad copy, and a lot of Basecamp comments

You can juggle multiple client accounts without dropping balls

You take ownership and don't wait to be told what to do next

Available to work USA Central Time (CT) hours



Nice to have (but not required — we can teach this)

Previous experience working at a digital marketing agency (huge plus)

Experience in regulated niches like financial services, fertility/health, or coaching

Conversions API and server-side tracking setup

Familiarity with GoHighLevel, Agency Analytics, or similar tools

Experience writing UGC scripts or directing video ads

Background working with personal brands, authors, speakers, or course creators



Why join us

Almost two decades in the game — you'll learn from a team that's seen what works (and what doesn't) across hundreds of clients

AI-forward culture — you'll be encouraged (and expected) to use AI to make your work better and faster every day

Diverse client roster — financial advisors, fertility doctors, bestselling authors, coaches, and more, so you won't get bored

You're part of a real team, not a solo media buyer drowning alone — designers, copywriters, developers, and account managers have your back

Direct response focus means your work has clear, measurable impact — when campaigns win, everyone sees it

Featured in major media (Forbes, Inc., Time, NYT, CNN, GMA) — you'll be working on campaigns with real visibility

Full-time role with a team that genuinely values growth and ownership



Don't worry if you don't check every box. If you've got 5+ years of solid Meta Ads experience, you're already using AI to level up your work, and you have a genuine curiosity for the strategy, auditing, and direct response side of things — we want to hear from you.



How to apply

Head over to 
/careers and submit:

title: 24 HR Review | VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Senior Video Editor ( Pacific Standard Time )
description:
Application Requirements:

1. Use at least 10AP for your application.

2. Include "Senior Video Editor Pro" in your subject line.



Note: Applications missing either requirement will not be considered.

_________________________________________________________



About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- 3–5+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

- Ability to research and implement new AI workflows to improve efficiency and output quality



Work Ethic & Discipline

- Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work

- Ability to follow feedback precisely and minimize repeated revisions



Bonus Experience

- Motion graphics or animation skills.

- Experience in e-commerce, outdoor brands, or creator channels.

- Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, thumbnails, keywords).

- Ability to generate ideas for hooks, storylines, and visual treatments.



What We Offer

title: Commercial Real Estate Virtual Assistant | Cold Calling, CRM,  Lead Generation, Social Media Support
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and professional Virtual Assistant / Inside Sales Support Specialist to support a growing Commercial Real Estate advisory business based in Orlando, Florida.

This role is ideal for someone who is confident in cold calling, lead qualification, CRM management, databasing, appointment setting, and light social media support, with a strong ability to communicate professionally and support revenue-generating activities. This role is designed for someone who wants to grow into a long-term strategic support position within a growing commercial real estate advisory business.

This is not a basic admin role.

You will play a key part in helping generate business opportunities, maintaining our prospect pipeline, and supporting deal flow.

Key Responsibilities

• Conduct daily outbound cold calls to business owners, property owners, tenants, and decision-makers

• Qualify prospects by gathering information such as:

o current location

o lease expiration

o square footage needs

o expansion / relocation plans

o decision-making timeline

• Schedule qualified discovery calls and meetings directly for the broker

• Maintain and update all lead activity within Pipedrive CRM

• Build and maintain prospect databases and call lists

• Research local businesses, owners, and companies for outreach campaigns

• Tag, segment, and organize contacts by asset type and lead stage

• Manage follow-up sequences and reactivation campaigns for dormant leads

• In client follow-up communications, attention to detail is extremely important. Please include in your introduction with the subject line: CRE VA Application –your full name,  how you would professionally follow up with a business owner needing approximately 1,500 SF in Orlando within the next 6 months, and what information you would gather prior to scheduling a call.

• Assist with social media support, including post scheduling, content organization, a plus

• Provide daily update and weekly performance reports

• Assist with
 follow-up and pipeline maintenance

Ideal Experience

• Previous experience as a real estate virtual assistant, inside sales rep, ISA, or cold caller

• Experience building and maintaining a database

• Data sorting

• Experience using CRM platforms, preferably Pipedrive

• Excellent spoken and written English

• Confident and professional phone presence, prospecting skills

• Strong internet connection and quiet work environment

• Highly detail-oriented and organized

• Comfortable working with KPIs and performance metrics

• Experience in social media management, content scheduling, campaign management or digital engagement is a plus

•
 monitoring

• Experience in commercial real estate, leasing, brokerage, or B2B sales is strongly preferred

Schedule

Part-time to start: 15–20 hours per week

Potential to grow into a long-term role.

Compensation

Please include your hourly rate, relevant experience, and a short voice recording introducing yourself if possible.

Applications that demonstrate strong communication, professionalism, and attention to detail will be prioritized.

Our team is dedicated to developing and launching innovative apps that are simple, elegant, and impactful, with a global reach. We embrace a fast-paced, iterative approach and prioritize product-market fit in all we create. What we offer:

The opportunity to build mindful, intelligent tech with lasting impact

This role requires someone confident on the phone, consistent, and resilient—someone who does not get discouraged by rejection and stays positive and professional in every call.

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor (Remote – Philippines)

U.S.-Based Outdoor Gear Brand

We’re a fast-growing outdoor gear company creating products for people who feel more at home in the mountains, on the water, and off the grid than they do indoors. From backcountry hunts to cold mornings at camp, our brand lives in real-world adventure — and we’re looking for a Video Editor who can bring those stories to life.

This role is ideal for someone who loves pacing, emotion, and visual storytelling just as much as clean cuts and color.



About the Role

You’ll be a key part of our creative team, turning raw field footage into compelling stories that move people — whether that’s a product launch film, a social reel, or a YouTube mini-doc. You’ll collaborate daily with our U.S.-based creative leads and marketing team while working remotely from the Philippines.

We move fast, care about craft, and believe great editing is invisible — until it hits you in the chest.



What You’ll Do

• Edit high-quality video content for:

Social media (short-form, vertical, performance-driven)

YouTube and brand storytelling films

Product launches and campaigns

Paid ads and performance marketing

• Shape story from raw footage, not just assemble cuts

• Select music, build pacing, and enhance emotional tone

• Perform color correction and basic color grading

• Clean up and mix dialogue, natural sound, and music

• Add motion graphics, titles, and simple visual effects when needed

• Organize and manage media, project files, and exports

• Create multiple cutdowns and format variations for different platforms

• Collaborate across time zones with U.S. creative leadership

• Take feedback well and iterate quickly



What We’re Looking For

Must-Haves

3+ years professional video editing experience

Strong portfolio showing storytelling ability (not just flashy cuts)

Must be able to work U.S. Mountain Time hours primarily (9:00am to 5:00pm Mountain Time) with flexible schedule opportunities after training period

Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro

Working knowledge of After EffectsSolid understanding of pacing, rhythm, and emotional storytellingExperience editing outdoor, lifestyle, documentary, or product contentStrong English communication skills (written and spoken)Ability to work independently and hit deadlines without hand-holdingReliable high-speed internet and professional remote setupBig Pluses

Experience with outdoor, hunting, camping, or adventure brandsColor grading experience (Lumetri or DaVinci a bonus)Sound design skillsUnderstanding of social media performance editing (hooks, retention, etc.)Experience working with U.S.-based teams



You’re a Great Fit If You…

Can turn messy field footage into a clear, emotional storyKnow when to let a shot breathe — and when to cut fastCare about tiny details most people never noticeUnderstand that editing is storytelling, not just softwareTake direction well but also bring your own creative instinctsLove the outdoors (even if you’re editing it from your desk)



What You’ll Get

Long-term remote role with a growing U.S. outdoor brandConsistent, ongoing project workCreative team that values craft and storytellingOpportunity to work on meaningful, real-world adventure content



How to Apply

Please submit:

Your portfolio (REQUIRED — applications without samples will not be considered)A short note about your editing style and experienceYour software proficiency and internet speedYour availability (hours per week)

Must apply with 8 apply points

Must submit a resume



If you know how to make someone feel the cold morning air, the weight of a pack, or the quiet before sunrise — we want to see your work.

- Highly creative and high-end designs

- Detail-oriented and good visual eye

- Reliability - we need to be sure we can execute projects on time to our customers

- Availability - from 8 pm to 12 am in your time zone so we can reach you 



An asset, bu not required :



- Experience in mobile app design 





If you think that you have the correct skills and experience, please write to me and answer these 4 questions:



1. In the section above about the requirements, can you give details about each requirement (your skill, how many years of experience, your ideas or thoughts)



2. How many hours per month do you have to work with us?



3. Please provide your expected hourly rate. 



4. Please provide a portfolio of website designs, logo designs and graphic charters





What you can expect from us when you apply:

- If we believe there could be a fit between us, we will schedule a Google Meet call in the next few days. 

- We will start with one small project that will not be paid. If it goes well, we will try you out for 1 month with paid projects. If it goes well, it can become a full-time position with us.





Looking forward to meeting you and learning what projects you have completed so far!



--

Andréanne Lafleur

Cofounder of Bridge Media

title: WordPress Website Programmer & GTM conversion tracking
description:
Hello,



We are currently looking for an experienced WordPress Web Programmer to assist us with client WordPress updates and maintenances and with conversion tracking set up in Google Tag Manager (GTM).



This offer is for regular contract-based work but it may become a full-time position in the near future. We will pay per contract or per hour depending on the task. 



We can pay between 10$ - 20$ / hour USD - it depends on your skill level and your time evaluations for projects.



I am Andréanne, the co-founder of a dynamic web marketing and programming agency called Bridge Media, working with small to medium-sized businesses. We are located in the city of Montréal, in Québec, Canada. We are an experienced, collaborative, and fun team of talented people with various expertise who are passionate about the success of our clients. 





Here is what you would be doing : 



- WordPress maintenance and updates

- Helping the team set up template sites on a hosting environment

- Helping the team do website updates that are more complex than just changing a picture or text

- Assisting the team with conversion tracking set up on Google Tag Manager



We use GitLab for our source control repository and our websites are hosted on Siteground and Kinsta.





Requirements: 



- Good experience with Elementor in WordPress

- Detail-oriented and good visual eye - we need the desktop and mobile designs to look exactly the designs

- Reliability - we need to be sure we can execute projects on time to our customers

- Availability - from 8 pm to 12 am in your time zone so we can reach you 

- Plug-in customization and programming skills are an asset



If you think that you have the correct skills and experience, please write to me and answer these 4 questions:



1. In the section above about the requirements, can you give details about each requirement (your skill, how many years of experience, your ideas or thoughts)



2. How many hours per month do you have to work with us?



3. Please provide your expected hourly rate. 



4. Can you provide 3 examples (links to) of websites you have programmed that you feel proud of?





What you can expect from us when you apply:



If we believe there could be a fit between us, we will schedule a Google Meet call in the next few days. 



Looking forward to meeting you and learning what projects you have completed so far!



--

Andréanne Lafleur

Cofounder of Bridge Media

title: YouTube Video Editor (History Docuseries | AI Driven Content Studio)
description:
My name is Reece, and we’re expanding our network of YouTube channels across history-focused niches, using storytelling and long-form videos.



We’re building a portfolio of high-performing YouTube channels designed to reach millions of viewers globally, and we’re looking for a Video Editor who understands storytelling, pacing, and retention (not just cutting clips)



You’ll take a leading role in launching a brand-new AI-powered history docuseries channel.



This isn’t a one-off project... there’s long-term upside as we expand into more channels.



We’re combining:



- AI-generated videos using Veo 3, Kling or traditional YouTube automation B Rolls

- Sound design

- Engaging clips

- AI-generated imagery

- Clear, compelling voiceovers



The Opportunity:



This is not a typical editing role. You’ll be responsible for turning ideas into videos that people actually watch to the end.



You’ll work on content designed to:

- Hit 100K-1M+ views

- Keep viewers engaged for long durations

- Compete with fast-growing history channels



You won’t just edit... You’ll help shape:

- Pacing, structure, and storytelling

- The overall style we’re building toward



Here are a few examples of the style we’ll be emulating:

- 

- 

- 
 (B Roll example)



Work Process:



I will provide a topic and short outline. From there, you will:

- Use our custom GPT to generate a polished script

- Create a voice-over using ElevenLabs

- Source relevant clips (films, interviews, public footage)

- Combine clips and AI visuals into an engaging final video

- Maintain strong pacing and storytelling throughout



Upsides:



- You’ll learn how to create content that actually performs on YouTube

- Long-term role as we scale multiple channels

- Clear systems (no guessing what to do)

- All tools and software licenses are provided (editing tools, AI tools, voiceover tools, etc.)

- Performance bonuses as channels grow

- Opportunity to grow into a Lead Editor role



Position Details:

- Full-time: 40 hours per week (Monday to Saturday)

- Expected Output: 1–2 videos per day (40 mins per video)

- Monthly Salary: $400–$500 USD + incentive bonuses

- Regular performance-based pay reviews

- Long-term role with growth potential



Ideal Candidate Has:



- Passion for YouTube and storytelling

- Experience editing clip-based or commentary-style videos

- Good sense of pacing and retention

- Strong communication and reliability

- Ability to follow structure and deliver consistently



How to Apply:



- Start your message with your favourite animal

- Send 2–3 examples of your best work (similar style preferred)

- Tell us which of the example channels you like most (and why)

title: Video editing direct response marketing meta ads
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Video Editor specialized in Performance Marketing for Meta 
 & Instagram) Ads to join our team on a long-term basis.



What we are looking for:

• Strong mastery of performance-driven cutting styles (fast-paced, hook-based, UGC, direct response, scroll-stopping edits).

• Excellent English language skills (spoken and written).

• Ability to work confidently with AI translation tools.

• Capability to create videos in both English and German.

• Experience in selecting and cutting the right scenes according to a given script.

• Ability to generate high-quality voice-overs in English and German using ElevenLabs or similar AI voice tools.

• Strong sense for timing, storytelling, and ad psychology.

• High attention to quality and detail.



Work Structure:

• Hourly-based collaboration.

• Long-term position with daily video production.

• You will become part of our Creative System and work closely with our marketing team.

• Consistent workload with clear performance standards.



Trial Project:



Before starting long-term, you will receive a test project.

If the video meets our quality and performance expectations, you will be onboarded into our creative team for ongoing collaboration.



Important:



We are not looking for short-term freelancers.

We are looking for a reliable, long-term creative partner who takes quality seriously and understands performance marketing at a high level.

title: Full-Time Cold Caller / Appointment Setter — AI Receptionist Company
description:
We're hiring a full-time cold caller / appointment setter for Alyro AI, an AI receptionist company serving US home service businesses.

What you'll do:



High-volume cold calling to US business owners daily

Use the provided opener and talking points to guide natural conversations — no rigid script reading

Handle objections conversationally and build rapport with business owners

Log every call outcome in a shared spreadsheet

Book interested leads for discovery calls on the owner's calendar

Provide interested prospects with a demo phone number



Requirements:



Previous cold calling or sales experience required — must be comfortable having real conversations, not just reading a script

Clear, natural-sounding English (neutral or American accent preferred)

Quiet workspace with reliable internet

Must have a US phone number or VOIP service (e.g., OpenPhone, Google Voice) that displays a US caller ID. We can provide one if needed.

Available Monday-Friday, 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM US Central Time (11:00 AM – 7:00 PM UTC / 7:00 PM – 3:00 AM PHT)

Comfortable with high rejection — most calls won't answer or will say no

Reliable and consistent — show up every day, no excuses



Schedule: Monday – Friday, 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM US Central Time (11:00 AM – 7:00 PM UTC / 7:00 PM – 3:00 AM PHT). Full-time, 40 hours/week.

Pay: $4-5/hour USD ($640-800/month)

Trial period: 1-week paid trial to ensure fit before committing to ongoing role

What we provide:



Complete cold calling script with openers, objection handling, and voi
 scripts

Fresh lead lists weekly (you never need to find your own leads)

Full training on the process and tools

Simple tracking system

US VOIP number provided if you don't have one



About us: Alyro AI builds AI receptionists that answer phone calls 24/7 for home service businesses. The AI qualifies leads and books appointments automatically. Your job is to get business owners on the phone and book them for a demo — the product sells itself.

title: Client Success Manager (Giving Feedback) – $1,100/month
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role



Start at $935 per month base.

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

- All tools provided

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

- Join daily team check-ins

- Your role is to help clients succeed and stay long-term.



What We’re Looking For



- Strong English (written and spoken)

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Quiet workspace

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#2: Years of short-form content experience

#3: Years of client management experience

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

#5: Your portfolio



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Turo Fleet Virtual Assistant – Customer Service & Operations
description:
We are Social Drive LLC, a professional Turo car-sharing fleet based in Austin, Texas with 66 vehicles actively rented through the Turo platform. We are hiring TWO reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistants to cover our daily operations.



SHIFT OPTIONS (CST – Central Standard Time):

- Morning Shift: 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM CST (Monday, Wednesday–Sunday | Tuesday off)

- Evening Shift: 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM CST (Monday–Tuesday, Thursday–Sunday | Wednesday off)



Please indicate in your application which shift you are available for.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Respond to guest messages on Turo promptly and professionally

- Handle trip modification requests, extensions, and cancellations

- Coordinate with guests on pickup/drop-off logistics at Austin Airport

- Monitor active trips and flag issues to management

- Assist with roadside situations by contacting the appropriate support channels

- Coordinate ground team (cleaning/delivery) activities and scheduling

- Update internal tracking sheets (Google Sheets/Excel) with daily trip activity

- Escalate urgent issues to the owner via

- Perform basic administrative tasks as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

- Prior experience with Turo, car rental, or fleet operations is a STRONG advantage

- Excellent written English – you will be the voice of our business to guests

- Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace

- Available to work your assigned shift consistently 6 days a week

- Familiarity with Google Sheets/Excel,
, and iCloud messaging

- Self-motivated, organized, and able to work independently

- Able to start within 2 weeks



HIRING PROCESS:

Shortlisted candidates will complete a short paid trial task before a final offer is made. We are looking for long-term team members and offer consistent hours, on-time weekly pay, and a stable working relationship.



To apply: Send your resume, your preferred shift, and a brief note about any Turo or car rental experience you have.

title: Full-Stack & AI Engineer
description:
About Us



We’re building an AI-powered platform that helps government contractors turn complex solicitations (RFPs, RFQs, SOWs) into submission-ready, compliance-driven proposals in minutes—not weeks.



This is not a generic AI tool. We are building a document intelligence and workflow system that combines:



• AI-driven proposal generation

• Compliance automation

• Structured data extraction from real-world documents



Our goal is simple: help us win more government contracts with less effort.

 

The Role



We’re looking for a Full-Stack & AI Engineer to own the core product build—from UI to backend to AI pipelines.



You’ll work directly with the founder to turn real-world workflows into a production-ready platform.



This is a high-ownership role. You won’t just write code—you’ll help define the product.

 

What You’ll Build



Product Systems



• Web application (dashboard, proposal builder, compliance matrix)

• Document upload and processing pipelines

• Structured data models for RFPs, requirements, and proposals



AI / Intelligence Layer



• RFP parsing and requirement extraction

• Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) using company data

• Proposal section generation (executive summary, technical approach, etc.)

• Compliance mapping (requirements ? proposal sections)

• Prompt optimization and output validation



Platform Infrastructure



• API design and backend services

• Database architecture (PostgreSQL)

• File storage and document handling

• Background job processing (parsing, generation, exports)

 

Tech Stack (Initial)



• Frontend: Next.js, React, Tailwind

• Backend: Python (FastAPI)

• Database: PostgreSQL

• AI: LLM APIs, RAG systems

• Infra: AWS / Vercel / similar

 

What We’re Looking For



Core Requirements



• Years building production SaaS applications

• Strong full-stack experience (frontend + backend)

• Hands-on experience with LLM-based systems (RAG, prompt design, APIs)

• Experience working with unstructured data (documents, PDFs, etc.)

• Ability to design and ship systems end-to-end



Mindset



• Product-oriented (not just task-oriented)

• Comfortable with ambiguity and early-stage execution

• Focused on shipping fast and iterating

• Strong problem-solving and ownership mentality

 

Nice to Have



• Experience with document parsing / OCR pipelines

• Experience with workflow automation tools

 

What Success Looks Like 



• Users can upload an RFP and get structured requirements

• System generates a usable draft proposal

• Compliance matrix accurately maps requirements

• First real users are testing and giving feedback



Why Join



• Build a category-defining product from the ground up

• Direct impact on architecture, product, and direction

• Work on real-world problems with immediate business value

• Fast execution, no bureaucracy



NOTE: Include FSE&AIE2026 in your subject

title: Customer Service Head
description:
Hello, thank you for your viewing this job listing. Please provide me your rate and hours you would like to work. Also please let me know if you are comfortable answering phone calls, dealing with angry customers, and are able to work between the times of 9-5 cst. Need someone that will reply to
s fast! Prefer people with high level english. Opportunities for bonuses and promotions. Thank you!

title: Technical Recruiter – Commission Basis
description:
We're looking for a recruiter to help us find a Senior NetSuite Developer (details of that role available upon request). This is contingency-based; you get paid when we hire someone you bring to the table.



What we're looking for in a recruiter:

- Experience placing software engineers, bonus points for ERP/NetSuite or TypeScript roles

- A solid talent network (international candidates are fine - the role is remote)

- Ability to spot strong, experienced candidates and filter out AI-generated fluff applications

- Good communication and follow-through



Compensation: Flat fee, paid 50% upon successful hire and 50% after a 90-day retention period. If the hire doesn't work out within 90 days, the second payment is forfeited or a replacement candidate is provided. Fee negotiable based on experience.



To apply:

Share a bit about your recruiting background and how you typically source candidates. Please make sure the
 on your profile is linked to a Teams account, or provide one that is; we use Microsoft Teams for all communication.

title: Executive & Real Estate Virtual Assistant
description:
Executive & Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Remote, Calgary Time Zone)



Type: Part-time ? Full-time

Hours: 20 hrs/week (probation), transitioning to full-time

Location: 100% Remote (must be aligned with Calgary, AB time zone)



About the Role

We’re hiring a high-performing Executive & Real Estate Virtual Assistant to support a driven real estate professional scaling toward top commercial production while managing an active residential business and growing investment portfolio.



This is a long-term, high-trust role for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, takes ownership, and operates with discretion. You’ll be involved across business operations and personal admin — bringing structure, consistency, and efficiency to everything you touch.



Key Responsibilitie:



Commercial Real Estate

-Manage CRM daily and ensure consistent follow-up

-Coordinate showings, meetings, and deal flow

-Prepare listing packages and market research

-Track deals from offer to closing

-Liaise with lawyers, lenders, and inspectors

-Maintain pipeline visibility and deadlines



Residential Real Estate

-Manage and nurture inbound leads

-Coordinate showings and listing appointments

-Prepare marketing materials and client documents

-Upload and promote listings across platforms

-Coordinate staging, photos, and open houses

-Support transactions end-to-end

-Draft client communications and updates



Portfolio Management

-Track rents, leases, and renewals

-Coordinate with tenants, trades, and property managers

-Monitor and follow up on maintenance requests

-Organize documents and reporting

-Track expenses and flag vacancies



Personal & Executive Support

-Manage calendar, scheduling, and reminders

-Book travel, reservations, and logistics

-Handle errands, research, and vendor coordination

-Draft personal correspondence as needed



Requirements

-2+ years of experience as a VA, EA, or operations support

-Real estate or property management experience preferred

-Strong CRM experience (Follow Up Boss, HubSpot, etc.)

-Excellent written communication skills

-Comfortable managing real estate transactions and timelines

-Highly organized with strong attention to detail

-Proven ability to juggle multiple priorities

-High discretion with sensitive information

-Proactive, self-directed, and solution-oriented

-Interest in leveraging AI tools for efficiency



Nice to Have

-Experience with ChatGPT or Claude

-Google Workspace, Canva, Notion/Asana

-Dotloop or Skyslope

-MLS platforms

-Slack, Zapier, or property management tools



How to Apply

Submit:

-A short introduction

-Your most relevant experience

-CRMs and tools you’ve used

If you were supporting a top-producing real estate agent, what’s one system or process you’d implement in the first 30 days to improve efficiency? Would you use AI?

title: AI video editor and commercial maker
description:
About Us



We run a fast-growing camping trailer and truck topper company focused on high-end, visually appealing rigs. We’re building aggressive ad campaigns and want content that actually converts—not generic, low-effort AI videos.



What We Need



We’re looking for an AI Video Editor who can create high-quality AI avatar ads and commercial-style content, but also knows how to step in and manually refine/edit when AI falls short.



This is not a beginner role. You need to know how to make content look real, clean, and high-converting.



What You’ll Be Doing

Take raw footage of trailers, campers, and product shots ? turn into high-converting ad creatives

Create AI-generated avatars for ads (sales-style, lifestyle, demo videos)

Edit videos where the owner (me) may appear ? transform appearance, voice, or style using AI tools

Combine AI + manual editing for polished final output

Create multiple ad variations for testing (hooks, formats, angles)

Optimize content for:

 / Instagram ads

TikTok / short-form content

YouTube ads

Required Skills

Strong experience with AI video tools, such as:

Synthesia, HeyGen, Runway, Pika, etc.

Advanced editing skills in:

Adobe Premiere Pro

After Effects (preferred)

Ability to:

description:

description:
About the Role

Kranis B.V. is looking for an experienced Senior Brand Manager (E-Commerce) to take full ownership of our D2C brand operations. This role is highly strategic and hands-on, with full responsibility for managing and scaling our e-commerce brands across all brand-related functions excluding marketplace/platform operations.



You will be responsible for driving brand growth for two of our D2C brands—Minismus and Matakumi—with a strong focus on Shopify performance, pricing strategy, merchandising, conversion rate optimization, SEO, paid media, and brand presence across digital channels.



This is a senior role requiring proven experience managing high-revenue D2C brands or equivalent agency-level expertise.



Key Responsibilities

Own and manage the overall brand strategy for Kranis B.V.’s D2C brands

Lead all e-commerce brand initiatives across Shopify stores, including:

Pricing strategy and merchandising

Conversion Rate Optimization (CVR)

SEO optimization and website performance

Oversee and optimize paid media efforts, including
 Ads and Google Ads

Manage and align social media presence with brand strategy

Analyze performance data across e-commerce, marketing, and brand channels to drive growth and profitability

Collaborate with internal teams and external partners to ensure consistent brand execution

Continuously identify opportunities to improve brand positioning, customer experience, and revenue performance



Requirements

5+ consecutive years of experience managing a D2C brand (Shopify-based) with:

10M+ annual revenue, OR

5+ consecutive years working in an agency managing D2C brands at this level

Strong, hands-on experience with Shopify



Proven expertise in:

D2C e-commerce strategy

Pricing and merchandising

CVR and SEO optimization

Paid advertising (Meta & Google)

Highly analytical, data-driven, and commercially minded

Strong leadership, ownership mindset, and ability to manage multiple brand functions

Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills



What We Offer

Competitive salary package

Full-time, stable role with long-term growth opportunities

Collaborative and performance-driven work environment

Opportunity to take full ownership of established and growing D2C brands

title: Google Ads/Media Buyer
description:
We are an established Australian digital marketing agency looking for a smart, reliable, client-focused Paid Media and Client Success Coordinator based in the Philippines.



This is a junior-to-mid-level role, ideal for someone who enjoys both people and performance marketing.



You do not need to be the final strategist for every account. Our leadership team will handle much of the higher-level strategy. What we need is someone who can help manage campaigns well, communicate confidently with clients, work closely with our team, and embrace modern tools, including AI, to improve speed and quality.



If you love being part of a team, building strong client relationships, learning new platforms, and using technology to work smarter, we would love to hear from you.



About the role



You will help manage paid media accounts, support client communication, and work with our internal team to keep campaigns moving smoothly.



You will also be expected to use modern tools, including AI, as part of your workflow. We are looking for someone who is curious, adaptable, and excited by where digital marketing is heading.



What you will be doing



• Support campaign management across Google Ads, Meta Ads, and other platforms where relevant

• Assist with launches, optimisation, audience targeting, creative testing, reporting, and account QA

• Join client calls and communicate with clients in a clear, friendly, confident way

• Build strong relationships with clients and help them feel supported

• Work with our team to action campaign tasks and keep projects organised

• Use AI tools and workflow tools to improve research, execution, reporting, and delivery

• Help manage AI supported implementation workflows, including tools such as Manus and ChatGPT

• Review tracking, conversion actions, landing pages, and campaign structure for accuracy

• Stay open to learning new platforms, systems, and processes as we grow



Platforms you may work across



• Google Ads

• Meta Ads

• LinkedIn Ads

• TikTok Ads

• YouTube

• Microsoft Ads

• Other paid media platforms as needed



You do not need to be an expert in every platform already, but you must have solid paid media fundamentals and be willing to learn.



What we are looking for



• Excellent written and spoken English

• Strong client communication skills

• Friendly, professional, and confident in meetings

• Organised, detail oriented, and reliable

• Comfortable working as part of a team

• Open to feedback, coaching, and continuous improvement

• Comfortable with AI, automation, and modern technology

• Understanding of paid media fundamentals, including objectives, targeting, budgets, tracking, creative testing, and reporting

• Hands on experience with Google Ads and Meta Ads

• Reliable internet, a quiet workspace, and the ability to attend video meetings



This role is a great fit if you are



• Client focused and genuinely enjoy building relationships

• Curious about new technology and excited to use AI well

• Coachable and happy to grow with a team

• Proactive, calm, and solutions focused

• Interested in long term career growth in digital marketing



This role is not a fit if you



• Resist new technology or refuse to use AI tools

• Dislike speaking with clients

• Need constant direction for every task

• Struggle to adapt when platforms and processes change



Why join us



• Long term opportunity with room to grow

• Supportive team environment

• Clear strategic direction from leadership

• Exposure to multiple paid media platforms

• Opportunity to work closely with clients and make a real impact

• Modern, forward thinking agency environment



How to apply



Please send the following:



• A short introduction about yourself

• Your experience with Google Ads, Meta Ads, and any other paid media platforms

• A brief summary of the types of clients or campaigns you have worked on

• A short voice note or video introduction

• Your expected monthly salary in PHP

• Your available work hours

• The words AI Ready at the top of your application so we know you read the full ad



Please also answer these questions:



What paid media platforms have you worked on directly?

What do you enjoy more, client communication, campaign management, or a mix of both?

How have you used AI or automation tools in your work so far?

Tell us about a time you helped improve a client relationship or solved a campaign issue

What interests you about working with a team like ours?



Do not send a generic application. We are looking for someone thoughtful, switched on, and genuinely excited to grow with us.

title: VIDEO CLIPPER — 60,000 PHP/MONTH
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:

MORE ABOUT US



Young Publisher:

title: Travel Assistant (Insurance Support) | Full-Time | Training Provided
description:
Travel Insurance Assistant / Specialist



(Full-Time, Remote, EST)



PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING



$7/Hour Starting Rate | 40 Hours | Full-Time



Opportunity for increases based on performance

Strong performers in this role have earned consistent pay increases.

We review every application manually, so thoughtful, tailored applications are prioritized.



Full-time remote role focused on:



Travel insurance coordination and related tasks: drafting travel insurance for review, calling Viking/speaking directly with guests, and maintaining HubSpot CRM and trackers.



DO NOT APPLY if:



-You do not have clear, confident spoken English that can be easily understood by senior clients.



-You do not have experience in the travel industry or working with detailed, client-facing processes.



-You submit template applications or generic resumes. Please keep your introduction natural and personal so we can understand you.



-You're seeking part-time, short-term, or freelance work.



-You cannot commit to U.S. Eastern Time business hours (9am–5pm EST, night shift PHP)



-You do not carefully follow application instructions. Applications missing steps may not be reviewed.



DO APPLY if:



-You have worked in the travel industry OR have strong experience handling detailed client support, bookings, or coordination tasks.



-You have experience explaining policies, handling client questions, or working with structured documentation (insurance experience is a strong advantage, but not required).



-You can send a short video introduction.



-You are looking for a long-term, full-time remote role with a stable team that invests in your growth.



-You are professional, detail-oriented, and take pride in doing things correctly.



-You can work independently, follow documented processes, and ask questions when something is unclear.



-If you have handled complex client situations, briefly mention one example in your application.



-If you have worked with senior or high-touch clients before, please highlight this.



About Us



We are a boutique travel agency based in Atlanta, GA (EST). We specialize in luxury river cruises with Viking and provide high-touch support for our clients.



We're warm, organized, and focused on delivering excellent service. Our team is small, collaborative, and values doing things right.

We're looking for someone who wants to grow into this role long-term.



Who We're Looking For

Prior experience as a virtual assistant or in a similar remote support role



Excellent written English with a professional and friendly tone



Proven ability to work independently and manage detailed tasks



High attention to detail, follow-through, and accountability



Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace



Bonus Points:

Any experience with Viking Cruises or river cruising



HubSpot CRM experience (or experience with similar CRMs)



Familiarity with booking systems, invoices, or client records



Experience reviewing, explaining, or processing insurance (any industry)



Your Role



As our Virtual Assistant, you'll be responsible for:



Drafting client
s



Updating HubSpot CRM and internal trackers



Calling Viking Cruises and partners to verify information or resolve questions



Supporting the insurance department with administrative tasks



Accuracy matters. Small mistakes in names, dates, or policies can impact the client experience.



You will be trained and supported as you learn our systems.



So expectations are clear:



You'll work directly with our team as internal support



Guest/client
s are drafts for review



You'll have autonomy for routine tasks, with guidance on when to escalate



You'll be supported by an experienced team invested in your success



Schedule



Target hours: 9:00am to 5:00pm EST (evening/night shift in the Philippines — please confirm this works for you)



Hours may vary slightly based on business needs



Saturday coverage may be introduced later via rotation



How to Apply



Applications that don't follow these instructions may not be reviewed. This helps us identify candidates with strong attention to detail.



Candidates who clearly follow all steps are prioritized.



Step 1:



Send your application with the subject line or first sentence including: "Meghan's #1"



Step 2:



Include a short video introduction that:

Keep it natural and concise. We are looking for clarity, not perfection.



Step 3:

If that sounds like you — we encourage you to apply today.

title: Sales Operations Specialist
description:
If you are looking for a mundane, punch-the-clock job, please skip this post.



We are a fast-moving, 3-founder startup (current YC Spring applicants) building Nexeo.ai — an ambitious AI-driven visibility and optimization platform. We are leaving traditional, clunky data dashboards in the past and building an intuitive, blazing-fast, "Apple-level" expert workspace. This is not just a gig: We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will grow with us, push the limits of what is possible, and build the best possible experiences in today’s world.

We do not care about your age, your years of corporate experience, or your formal degrees. We care about your slope. If you are hungry, detail-obsessed, and driven to build something world-class, we want you.



About the Company:



Angry Digital Inc. is a US-based AI technology company building Nexeo.ai — an AI Search Intelligence platform that helps digital agencies track, measure, and optimize how their clients appear in AI-powered search results (ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and more). We’re a fast-moving founding team backed by real revenue from our e-commerce portfolio and owned media properties. This is a ground-floor opportunity at a company building category-defining software.



The Role:



You’ll be the engine behind our sales pipeline. Our Head of Sales needs a sharp, detail-oriented operator who can research prospects, qualify leads, manage CRM data, and ensure every outreach sequence runs like clockwork. You won’t be cold calling or closing deals — you’ll be building the infrastructure that makes closing possible.



Core Responsibilities:



-Source and research prospects using 
, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and company websites

-Score and qualify leads against our Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) using documented criteria

-Enrich contact records with company size, tech stack, key decision-maker details, and their current situation

-Maintain CRM hygiene in ClickUp — update statuses, log activities, tag leads by stage

-Prepare pre-call research briefs for the Head of Sales before discovery calls

-Monitor inbox replies to outbound sequences and classify response intent (interested, objection, OOO, bounce, not interested)

-Track outbound sequence performance metrics (open rates, reply rates, meeting conversion)

-Assist with drafting personalized
 sequences following approved templates and brand voice

-Maintain and update sales playbook documentation as processes evolve

-Flag high-intent signals (funding rounds, leadership changes, job postings) that indicate buying readiness



Required Skills & Experience:



-2+ years in sales operations, lead generation, or SDR support role

-Proficient with 
 or similar prospecting tools (ZoomInfo, Lusha, Hunter)

-Experience with CRM systems (ClickUp, HubSpot, Salesforce, or Pipedrive)

-Strong English written communication — you will draft research briefs and
 copy

-High attention to detail and ability to follow documented SOPs consistently

-Comfortable working US Eastern Time hours (minimum 4-hour overlap)

-Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace



Bonus Skills (Not Required):



-Experience in SaaS, digital marketing, or agency environments

-Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator advanced search

-Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) for research acceleration

-Basic understanding of SEO, digital advertising, or e-commerce



Compensation & Details:



-Salary: USD $490.00–$740.00/month depending on experience

-Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)

-Schedule: Monday–Friday, flexible start with minimum 4-hour US ET overlap

-Location: 100% Remote (Philippines-based)

-Benefits: 13th-month pay, performance bonuses tied to pipeline metrics, clear growth path to Sales Operations Manager as we scale



How to Apply:



Send your resume and a short Loom video (under 3 minutes) introducing yourself and walking through one example of a lead research project you completed. Bonus points if your Loom shows your actual screen and tools, not just a talking head.

Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.
