title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) / Appointment Setter
description:
About Leda

We make LEDA, a learning experience platform that makes leadership development easy! We use expert interviews, animations, games, self-assessments and practical activities to turn managers into better leaders.

We work with CEOs and People & Culture leaders across Australia and APAC to help them develop the many people in their organisations. Our mission? Better organisations, by making it easy for companies to develop their established and emerging leaders. High quality and fun leadership development for all!

We're a small, profitable startup based in Melbourne. We like to laugh and have fun. And yes — you'll get leadership training too.



The Role

We're looking for someone to join our small but growing team with an SDR background wanting an accelerated pathway to Inside Sales.

This is a rare opportunity to become a critical member of a profitable start-up that has a real and positive impact on people's lives.



What You'll Be Doing



Converting inbound leads from our campaigns into conversations with the founders and yourself

Calling warmed leads (40–50 calls per day)

Nurturing and growing new business opportunities within the SMB segment (companies with <600 employees) in APAC

Understanding prospective customers' pain points and educating them on Leda's value

Guiding prospects through the sales process with the founder

Managing some opportunities to close, readying yourself to move into an Inside Sales role



Skills You'll Need



Minimum 12 months experience in an SDR or Inside Sales role

Highly empathetic and likeable on the phone, with great communication skills to explain, influence and persuade

Clear English with confident, friendly delivery

Preferably experience in tech, training, online learning, or selling to HR / People and Culture teams

Familiarity with Australian business culture is a plus





Hours & Pay

Schedule:



Part-time to start: 20 hours/week (Mon–Fri, 10am–12pm and 1–3pm AEST)

Path to full-time for top performers



Compensation:



$7 USD/hour base

$40 USD per sat meeting

Part-time earnings: ~$680–780/month

Full-time performers: $1,400–1,600+/month



Technical Requirements:



Your own computer or laptop (not a phone or tablet)

Stable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps)

Headset with microphone

Quiet workspace with minimal background noise



Prove you can deliver, and we'll give you more hours and a clear path to Inside Sales.



How to Apply



Fill in this form

(
/form/623bfc36-e96a-4fc
a795ea5cdb)

and we'll send you our short screening process (about 30–45 minutes). It involves a speaking assessment, sales simulations, and a short video recording.

You'll have 72 hours to complete it. No resume needed — just show us what you can do.

Thank you very much for your time and interest!

Team Leda

title: Short series video editor
description:
We’re hiring a video editor to craft high-quality short-form episodes (1–3 minutes each, anywhere from 3-6 episodes per series) with a clean, cinematic, and story-first approach.



This is not typical TikTok-style editing. We’re looking for someone who prioritizes pacing, emotion, and visual storytelling over flashy effects or 
-driven edits.

title: Short Form Video Editor - Games!
description:
I am looking to hire a short form video editor to handle a high volume of simple game content, starting with a test run. I have hundreds of videos currently needing edits, with more being produced regularly. We play games such as Tapple, Spindoodle, Timer Games, and games we make up. 



Our goal is to grow our entertainment & gaming channels from scratch so an ideal candidate would have a viral eye, good ideas for pacing and previous experience editing short form content. We would like our short form videos to garner significant amounts of views so its important the editing helps reinforce that. 



For this test, I want to see several different reels of the same footage that can be posted to Instagram, TikTok, and Youtube Shorts. I will provide 2-10 minutes of raw footage per game and want a final video that's up to ~120 seconds. Your goal is to create engaging content that will help grow our social media channels. Great videos will have superior retention rates and prolonged watch time. 



Goals:

- Hook the viewer within the first 2 seconds

- Maximize retention to keep viewers watching until the end

- Emphasize emotion and reactions

- Make the video understandable without sound

- No empty space

- Create loopable endings if possible



Please let me know if you are interested, and I can send over the footage.



Suggested Requirements:

• Proficient in CapCut and or other softwares to deliver short form content

• Strong understanding of short-form content - hooks, pacing, captions, transitions

• Reliable internet connection and ability to meet deadlines consistently

• Good communication in English (written)

title: Remote Graphic Designer - Decorated Apparel
description:
We're a decorated apparel shop in El Paso, Texas, with 15 years in business and a serious creative focus- screen printing, embroidery, DTF, and large-format work. We serve collegiate institutions, professional sports organizations, and regional businesses- work that has to be right every time. We're looking for a skilled remote designer who knows the print world, not just software.



What you'll be doing:

- Building customer mockups for approval (apparel, hats, merch)

- Separating artwork for screen printing (spot color, simulated process, halftone)

- Prepping transparent PNG files for DTF printing

- Using halftone techniques to knock out and reduce colors

- Staying on top of jobs, tasks, and approvals through Printavo- our shop management software (training provided)

- Communicating clearly and responding fast- this is a production environment



Software:

Preferred- CorelDRAW

Required- Adobe Illustrator

Required- Adobe Photoshop

Required- Printavo



Good to have:

Plus- English fluency

Plus- Spanish (any level)

Plus- Apparel industry background



Hours & Availability:

This is a full-time remote position. You must be available and responsive during our business hours- 8 AM to 5 PM Mountain Standard Time (MST), Monday through Friday. We need someone who's essentially on-call during those hours- ready to turn around files, respond to questions, and keep jobs moving. If you go dark during the workday, this won't work.



Communication:

Primary communication is through Google Chat and WhatsApp. Fast, clear responses are non-negotiable.



How to apply:

Send us samples of print production work- separations, DTF files, and mockups. Tell us which software you use and how long you've been doing this. Pay is negotiable based on your experience and skill level.



If you're using AI to apply, at least make it sound like you. We want to hear your voice, not ChatGPT's. It's ok if your English isn't 100% perfect.

title: Graphic Designer (E-commerce)

Graphic Designer (E-commerce)

This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a performance-driven environment and can deliver high-quality outputs at scale using AI tools and Adobe Photoshop.

Qualifications:

For interested applicant:

title: Sales Representative
description:
About Us

Web Dynamics International is a fast-growing full-service digital marketing agency serving over 1,000 clients across four countries, the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and Australia. We help small and medium-sized businesses build their online presence through social media management, paid advertising, and lead generation.

Founded in 2017, we started with door-to-door sales in Phoenix, Arizona and grew into an international agency with a team of 50+ employees. We are a company built on integrity, communication, and delivering a WOW customer experience to every client we work with.

We are expanding our sales team and are looking for driven, disciplined, and hungry sales representatives to join us full-time.



What You'll Be Doing

As a Sales Representative at Web Dynamics, you will be responsible for contacting inbound leads, running discovery calls, recommending the right package, closing deals, and managing your pipeline through our CRM system.

This is a high-volume outbound calling role. Leads are generated through our paid advertising campaigns, you are NOT cold calling strangers. You are calling people who have already expressed interest in our services.

Your daily responsibilities will include:



Contacting inbound leads through our dialer system

Running discovery to understand the prospect's business and needs

Recommending and presenting the right social media management package

Handling objections and closing deals on the call

Following up consistently with leads in your pipeline

Updating the CRM accurately after every call (notes, dispositions, opportunity value, tags)

Ensuring proper handoff to the onboarding team after every sale

Hitting a minimum of 300 calls per day

Working toward a goal of 50 sales per month or $5,000 in monthly revenue



What We're Looking For

We are not looking for order-takers. We are looking for closers  people who are hungry, disciplined, and don't take no for an answer easily.

You are a great fit if you:

Have a strong command of English (spoken and written)  this is non-negotiable as you will be speaking with US, Canadian, Australian, and UK business owners

Are comfortable making high volumes of outbound calls every day

Are coachable and willing to follow a proven sales process

Are self-motivated and don't need someone standing over your shoulder

Have a competitive mindset and are driven by results and commission

Can handle rejection without getting discouraged

Are organized and disciplined with CRM updates and follow-up

Have a quiet, professional workspace with a reliable internet connection

Have a working computer/laptop and headset



Preferred Experience & Skills

Previous sales experience (phone sales preferred)

Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM is a big plus

Familiarity with 
 for team communication

Experience working with a US-based company or US clients

Digital marketing or social media knowledge is a plus but not required



What We Offer



Commission on every sale you close  the more you sell, the more you make

Full training provided through our comprehensive sales training portal

A structured, proven sales process with scripts and systems in place

A high-energy team environment with clear performance expectations

Room to grow within a fast-expanding international agency

Consistent leads  you will never have to prospect or cold call



Performance Expectations

We want to be upfront about what is expected here so there are no surprises:

Minimum 300 calls per day

Maximum 3-minute wrap time between calls

50 sales per month or $5,000 in monthly revenue is the baseline target

You are expected to be profitable within your first 30 days

Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly

CRM must be updated accurately after every single call

This is a performance-based role. If you show up, follow the process, and put in the work  you will make money. If you are looking for a relaxed job where you can coast, this is not the right fit.



Requirements

Stable, high-speed internet connection (wired preferred)

Quiet, professional workspace with no background noise

Working computer/laptop

Quality headset for calls

Smartphone or ability to use 
 for team communication

Must be available Monday – Friday 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Arizona Time (MST)  no exceptions

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About AXIS Media Group



AXIS Media Group is an Australian-based digital marketing and media agency. We produce high-quality creative assets for our clients across social media, advertising, branding, and digital campaigns. Design is central to everything we do — it shapes how our clients’ brands are perceived, and we take that seriously.



We are looking for a skilled freelance Graphic Designer based in the Philippines who can work with us on an ongoing basis. If you are someone who lives and breathes design, knows Adobe Photoshop inside out, and can produce polished, professional work consistently, we want to hear from you.



The Role



As a freelance Graphic Designer for AXIS Media Group, you will be creating a range of visual assets for client campaigns, social media, advertising, and brand projects. You will receive briefs through ClickUp, communicate with the team via Slack, and use Claude as an AI assistant to support your workflow where relevant. Your work will represent our clients publicly, so quality, consistency, and attention to detail are non-negotiable.



Software Requirements



You must have your own licensed access to the full Adobe Creative Suite, including Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and Premiere Pro. This is a hard requirement — not optional. We do not provide software licences for freelance positions.



• Adobe Photoshop — expert level (primary tool for this role)

• Adobe Illustrator — strong proficiency for vector work and logos

• Adobe InDesign — for layouts, decks, and multi-page documents

• Adobe Premiere Pro or After Effects — advantageous for motion/video assets

• Canva — for collaboration and quick assets.

• ClickUp — for receiving project briefs, managing tasks, and tracking deliverables

• Slack — for day-to-day communication with the AXIS team

• Claude — AI assistant used to support workflow, research, and brief interpretation



Key Responsibilities



• Design social media graphics, ad creatives, banners, and digital assets to brief

• Produce brand-consistent visuals across multiple client accounts with varying style guides

• Retouch and manipulate photography and imagery to a high professional standard in Photoshop

• Create print-ready and web-ready files in the correct formats and resolutions

• Design marketing collateral including flyers, brochures, presentations, and one-pagers

• Receive and interpret creative briefs through ClickUp and deliver to agreed timelines

• Communicate proactively via Slack — flag questions early, provide progress updates, and meet deadlines

• Incorporate feedback promptly and professionally without compromising quality

• Maintain well-organised, clearly labelled file structures for handoff and archiving

• Use Claude as an assistant tool to support brief interpretation, copy suggestions, and ideation where relevant



Skills & Requirements



Essential:

• Expert-level Adobe Photoshop skills — this is the core tool for this role

• Own licensed access to the full Adobe Creative Suite

• Strong graphic design fundamentals: typography, colour theory, layout, and composition

• Experience designing for digital platforms (social media, digital ads, web)

• A sharp eye for detail — you notice the small things that make design look polished

• Ability to work across multiple brand styles and adapt your aesthetic to suit each client

• Organised and reliable — you meet deadlines and communicate clearly when you cannot

• Comfortable working in English — reading briefs, communicating with the team, and understanding feedback

• Comfortable using ClickUp for task management and Slack for communication

• Willing to use Claude as a workflow assistant where prompted



Advantageous (not required but a bonus):

• Experience with motion graphics or video editing (After Effects or Premiere Pro)

• UI/UX or web design experience

• Experience working with Australian brands or agencies

• Social media content design experience (Reels covers, Stories, carousel posts, etc.)

• Brand identity and logo design experience



Who We Are Looking For



We want a designer who takes genuine pride in their craft. Someone who understands that a well-executed design is more than just visual — it communicates, persuades, and builds trust. If you find yourself noticing kerning issues on signs or instinctively reaching for Photoshop to fix a poorly cropped image, you’re our kind of person.

This is a freelance position, so you will need to be self-directed and reliable. We are not looking for someone who needs to be chased for updates. We want a professional who manages their own workload, communicates proactively, and consistently delivers work that makes our clients look great.



How to Apply



To be considered, please include the following in your application:

• Msg via W h a t s a p p (
)

• Your updated resume

• A portfolio of your design work — links to examples or a PDF showcase (required)

• Confirmation that you have licensed access to the full Adobe Creative Suite

• A brief note (3–5 sentences) on your design background and why you’re a great fit for this role

• Your availability and typical turnaround times

title: Remote Sales Setter / Appointment Setter / Cold Caller
description:
GreenLightAds is looking for a motivated remote sales setter to help us reach out to businesses and book qualified calls for our marketing agency.



Your job will be to message, call, and follow up with business owners, start conversations, and set appointments for our team. We help businesses grow through paid ads, creative, landing pages, and lead generation.



This is best for someone who is confident, speaks well, follows up consistently, and is hungry to make money.



What you’ll do:

title: Video Editor (DaVinci Resolve Specialist)
description:
About AXIS Media Group



AXIS Media Group is an Australian digital marketing and media production agency. We create high-quality content for a range of clients — from social media campaigns and brand videos to long-form content and digital advertising. We are a team that cares about the craft, not just the output. Every frame matters to us, and we want a Video Editor who feels the same way.

We are looking for a talented and dedicated Video Editor based in the Philippines to join our remote team on a full-time basis. This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow alongside a creative agency and become a genuine part of the team.



The Role



As our Video Editor, you will work on a variety of content projects — social media short-form clips, brand videos, testimonials, ad creatives, and more. Your primary tool is DaVinci Resolve, and you need to know it deeply: colour grading, audio mixing, multi-cam editing, transitions, text animations, and exports. You will collaborate closely with our Australian team, attend regular video check-ins, and bring a strong sense of visual storytelling to everything you produce.



What We Provide



We set our editors up for success. You will receive access to Higgsfield AI for enhanced video production, free mentoring calls with senior tea
mbers, ready-to-use assets and templates, and ongoing support to develop your skills. We invest in the people we work with.



• Access to Higgsfield AI — provided by AXIS for your productions

• Regular one-on-one and group mentoring calls at no cost to you

• Pre-built asset libraries, templates, and motion resources

• Clear briefs and a structured workflow so you always know what is expected

• A collaborative, feedback-driven team environment where your craft is respected



Key Responsibilities



• Edit short-form and long-form video content to a high professional standard using DaVinci Resolve

• Colour grade footage to match brand look and feel, or as directed

• Mix and clean audio tracks including voiceover, music, and ambient sound

• Create and apply motion graphics, text animations, and lower thirds within DaVinci Resolve

• Export and deliver files to the correct specs for each platform (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, web, etc.)

• Attend virtual tea
etings on Mondays and Wednesdays, with availability for Friday check-ins as required

• Collaborate via Slack for day-to-day communication and updates

• Manage and organise project files within Google Drive and ClickUp

• Use Claude (AI assistant) as directed to support workflows and efficiency

• Take creative direction, incorporate feedback, and revise work in a timely manner

• Maintain consistent output quality across multiple concurrent projects



Skills & Requirements



Essential:

• Minimum 2–3 years of professional video editing experience

• Expert-level proficiency in DaVinci Resolve — you must hold the paid (Studio) version

• Strong understanding of colour grading, audio mixing, and post-production workflow

• A genuine passion for the craft of editing — you understand pacing, storytelling, and visual rhythm

• Full-time availability — you are dedicated to this role and not juggling multiple full-time commitments

• Reliable internet connection and a capable editing workstation

• Comfortable working in English — written and spoken communication with the Australian team

• Familiarity with ClickUp for task and project management

• Familiarity with Slack for team communication

• Working knowledge of Google Drive for file storage and sharing

• Basic familiarity with Claude (AI assistant) or willingness to learn



Advantageous (not required but a bonus):

• Experience with Higgsfield AI or similar AI-assisted video tools

• Motion graphics experience in Fusion (built into DaVinci Resolve)

• Experience editing for Australian or Western-market brands

• Photography or cinematography background

• Short-form social media content editing experience (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)



Team Structure & Meetings



You will work closely with the AXIS team and be a genuine part of our production workflow. We run structured team check-ins twice a week on Mondays and Wednesdays, with an optional third session on Fridays when project load requires it. These are short, focused meetings — not lengthy sit-ins. We use these to align on priorities, share feedback, and keep projects moving.

Outside of meetings, the team communicates through Slack. We expect you to be responsive during working hours, take creative feedback constructively, and flag any issues early. We are a collaborative team that respects each other’s time and expertise.



Pay Structure



Editing projects are paid at a rate of AUD $30–$80 per video, based on the complexity, length, and requirements of each edit. More involved projects requiring colour grading, motion graphics, and multi-track audio are compensated at the higher end of the range. Clear briefs will always outline the expected scope before work begins.

We value quality over speed, and we price accordingly. If you are the right fit and your work consistently delivers, there is real potential for long-term, ongoing work with increasing volume.



Who We Are Looking For



We are not looking for a button-pusher. We want someone who loves editing — who thinks about why a cut works, who cares about how audio feels, and who sees the difference between a mediocre video and a great one. If you have been editing for years and still feel excited when a project comes together, you are the kind of person we want.

You need to be reliable, self-managed, and comfortable working asynchronously with an Australian team. You take feedback well, communicate clearly, and approach your work with professionalism and pride.



How to Apply



To be considered, please include the following in your application:

• Please D
 on WhatsApp 
• Your updated resume

• A showreel or portfolio of video work — links to edited videos you have produced (required)

• Confirmation that you use DaVinci Resolve Studio (paid version)

• A brief note (3–5 sentences) on your editing background and why this role interests you

• Your typical working hours and availability



Applications without a portfolio or showreel will not be considered.



We look forward to seeing your work.



— The AXIS Media Group Team

title: Senior Telesales Manager (Build & Scale Function)
description:
Senior Telesales Manager (Build & Scale Function)

8-Figure D2C Supplement Brand

Remote | $2,000/month + Performance-Based Profit Share



About the Role



We are an established 8-figure D2C supplement brand launching our outbound telesales channel.

We are looking for a hands-on telesales leader who can build this function from scratch — hiring, structuring, training, and scaling a high-performing outbound team.



This is a build-phase leadership role with clear opportunity to grow into Head of Telesales as the team scales.



What You’ll Build

You will:

Hire and train an initial team of 3–5 telesales reps



Design outbound workflows for:

Abandoned cart recovery

Subscription conversion

Subscription reactivation

Cross-sell and upsell campaigns

Develop call scripts and objection frameworks

Implement performance tracking and QA systems

Collaborate with marketing to align messaging

Help select and implement dialer + CRM systems

Ensure ethical and compliant supplement sales practices





What Success Looks Like

First 90 Days:

Team hired and trained

Core workflows implemented

100+ daily calls running

5–8% abandoned cart conversion baseline





Months 4–6:

Scale to 8–10 reps

$50K+ monthly incremental revenue

10–12% abandoned cart conversion

15–20% subscription conversion from contacted one-time buyers





Months 7–12:

Team of 15+ reps with leadership layer

$150K+ monthly incremental revenue

Telesales contributing 10–15% of total company revenue





Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)

5+ years in telesales / outbound sales

2+ years leading a sales team

Experience building or restructuring outbound teams

Experience working with ecommerce or D2C brands

Strong understanding of KPIs (conversion rate, AOV, CAC, LTV)

Experience with CRM and auto-dialer systems

Data-driven and performance-oriented



Preferred:

Subscription business experience

Supplement / health product experience

Familiarity with compliance standards in regulated industries



What We’re Looking For

Builder mindset — comfortable creating systems from zero

Strong coach and performance manager

Ethical sales approach (no misleading health claims)

Results-driven and accountable for revenue targets

Collaborative with marketing and operations



Compensation

$2,000/month base

Performance-based profit share tied to telesales revenue



Fully remote





Why This Role Is Unique

You’re not inheriting a call center.



You’re building a revenue channel from the ground up inside a proven 8-figure brand with strong product-market fit.



If you’ve wanted ownership instead of just managing KPIs someone else built — this is that opportunity.



To apply, please send the following:



Updated Resume



Cover letter answering:

How you would build this from scratch

Conversion rates and revenue results achieved

Your philosophy on ethical selling in supplements

Subject Line: Head of Telesales – [Your Name] or send your applications directly through this link:

title: Senior Finance & Accounts Manager
description:
We are a well-established New Zealand-based small business seeking an experienced part-time Financial Controller to support daily financial operations, cash management, and budgeting with real experience in small business operations. 

This is a hands-on role requiring strong attention to detail, discipline, and the ability to follow structured financial systems.

Hours are 2–4 hours per day, working New Zealand business hours.

You will be responsible for maintaining accurate, real-time financial visibility across the business, ensuring all transactions are reconciled daily and cash is managed with discipline.

You will work closely with the Managing Director and leadership team to support budgeting, reporting, and financial accuracy.



Key Responsibilities

- Prepare and maintain daily cash report (completed by 9am NZ time)

- Reconcile all transactions in Xero daily, ensuring accounts match bank balances and are correctly coded

- Review and manage accounts payable, including payment preparation

- Draft and maintain budgets with input from leadership

- Review and report on Profit First allocations (training provided)

- Ensure all financial data is accurate, up-to-date, and reliable



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- CPA qualification (Philippines or equivalent)

- Strong, proven experience using Xero

- Experience in daily reconciliations and cash management

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Strong communication skills – must ask questions if unsure (no guessing)

- Your English needs to be confident enough to hop on a Zoom with Financial Controller in USA or CEO

- Able to work consistently during NZ business hours

- We’d prefer you to have an Apple Mac for data security but will provide a VPN



Important Notes

This role does not include payroll or tax returns

This is a detail-focused, process-driven role, not a strategic finance role

Training will be provided on our internal financial system (Profit First)



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)

To apply, you must follow these instructions exactly:

Use the portal to apply (not an
)

Use the subject line: “Senior Finance & Accounts Manager Application - Why Me”



Include:

1. A short introduction (max 5 sentences) with your why and experience for this role specifically

2. Your experience with Xero (specific examples)

3. Confirmation of your CPA qualification

4. Your availability in NZ hours

5. Summarise what the Profit First System is in two sentences

6. A short video introducing yourself and why you'd love this role

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed. Do not use AI to apply



Next Step

Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a (paid) practical task based on real financial data.



Why Join Us

Stable, long-standing international business

Clear systems and processes already in place

Flexible part-time role with consistent hours

Opportunity to work closely with leadership and contribute to business stability

title: Compliance Research VA — US Healthcare / Medicare Billing
description:
Job Title: Compliance Research VA — US Healthcare / Medicare Billing



Company: HospiceShield Compliance — 
 — we help legitimate hospice operators across California protect their licenses during a major federal enforcement sweep.



What This Job Is: When a hospice operator pays us $3,995 for a compliance review, you are the person who does the work. You receive their submitted documents — Medicare billing records, patient census, staff roster, and facility license — and you run them through our 20-point compliance checklist. You identify issues, score each checkpoint, and populate our written report template with your findings.



Your report goes to a paying client. It must be accurate, clear, and professional every single time.



Your Daily Work: — Receive client documents from our Office Manager — Run the 20-point checklist against the client's submitted records — Use Claude AI as your analysis tool — we train you on exactly how — Populate the Shield Review report template with your findings — Deliver the completed report to the Office Manager within 5 business days — Flag any urgent findings immediately — same day



You Must Have — No Exceptions: — Fluent written and spoken English. Your reports go directly to US clients. Grammar and clarity are non-negotiable. — Real knowledge of the US Medicare system — how billing works, what Medicare Part A covers, what CMS is — Experience working with US healthcare documents — billing records, clinical records, or compliance documents — Extreme attention to detail — you are reviewing documents for errors that could expose a business to federal investigation — Reliable internet and quiet workspace during US Pacific Time hours



Strong Plus If You Have: — Background in hospice, home health, or long-term care compliance — Experience with CMS regulations, CDPH licensing, or Medicare hospice benefit rules — Prior work at a US healthcare law firm, medical billing company, or compliance consulting firm — Experience using AI tools for research and document analysis



Compensation: $700 to $1,000 per month depending on experience and English proficiency. Starting part-time with potential to grow full-time as client volume increases. Performance bonuses available.



How To Apply — Read This Carefully: Applications missing any of the following will be deleted without response.



Start your application with the word SHIELD in all caps on the first line. This confirms you read the full posting.

Record a 90-second voice recording and include the link. Introduce yourself, describe your US healthcare experience, and explain in your own words what Medicare Part A covers. Upload to Google Drive or Vocaroo and paste the link in your application.

Include 2 to 3 sentences describing a specific time you worked with US healthcare or billing documents.

Include your expected monthly rate.

We move fast. Qualified applicants will be contacted within 24 hours for a short interview.

title: CAD DRAFTER
description:
Join our fast-growing architectural firm located in the vibrant city of Cupertino CA, backed by AlphaX RE Capital. Specializing in single-family homes, ADUs, SB9 projects, multi-family dwellings, and light industrial developments, we are a diverse team dedicated to excellence in every project. With an array of services covering the entire real estate spectrum, from land acquisition to property listing, our firm offers a unique environment for growth and learning.



Position Summary



We are seeking a detail-oriented CAD Drafter to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating precise technical drawings and plans using computer-aided design (CAD) software. This role requires strong attention to detail, technical knowledge, and the ability to collaborate with engineers, architects, and project managers to bring designs to life.





Key Responsibilities

Develop and revise detailed technical drawings, blueprints, and schematics using CAD software.

Interpret design specifications, sketches, and notes to produce accurate plans.

Ensure drawings comply with industry standards, codes, and company guidelines.

Collaborate with engineers, architects, and other stakeholders to resolve design issues.

Maintain organized records of drawings, revisions, and project documentation.

Assist in preparing layouts, 3D models, and presentation materials when required.

Review and verify the accuracy of completed drawings before submission.





Qualifications

Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in Drafting, Engineering Technology, Architecture, or related field.

Proficiency in CAD software (AutoCAD, Revit, SolidWorks, or similar).

Strong knowledge of drafting standards, construction methods, and technical terminology.

Ability to read and interpret engineering and architectural drawings.

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.

Strong communication and teamwork abilities.

Experience in [industry-specific focus, e.g., mechanical, civil, electrical, or architectural drafting] preferred.





Preferred Skills

Familiarity with Building Information Modeling (BIM).

Experience with 3D visualization tools.

Knowledge of project management software.

Ability to work under tight deadlines and manage multiple projects simultaneously.





Fully Remote

Schedule: 9:00 AM–5:30 PM PST, Monday–Friday (12:00 AM–8:30 AM PH Time)

title: Ads Strategist for E Commerce Brands
description:
We’re an e commerce team testing multiple products every month and we’re looking for an ads strategist to join us long term.



Your role is to build the marketing and advertising strategy behind each product before launch and during scale. We are not looking for someone who only runs ads. We need someone who understands how to find the right angle, build the right campaign structure, guide creatives, and make decisions from data.



Main tasks:

• Research the product, market, competitors, and target audience

• Find strong marketing angles, hooks, desires, pain points, and positioning

• Build the ad strategy for each product launch

• Define campaign structure, audience testing, budget distribution, and scaling plan

• Give clear ad directions to the creative team for statics, videos, and UGC

• Write briefs for creatives, hooks, offers, and messaging angles

• Analyze ad performance and identify what to cut, improve, retest, or scale

• Improve CPA, CTR, conversion rate, and overall profitability

• Work with the team to constantly test new ideas and new products



What we need from you:

• Strong experience with e commerce paid ads

• Good understanding of Meta ads, testing strategy, and scaling logic

• Strong marketing sense, not just technical ad manager skills

• Ability to read data and turn it into clear action

• Someone proactive, sharp, and serious about performance



Work style:

We test many products every month, so this is long term work with constant volume for the right person.

title: Executive Assistant (Operations & Development-Real Estate)
description:
About Us

We are a premier U.S.-based real estate development and home building group with a heavy footprint in the San Francisco Bay Area. Our portfolio focuses on high-quality residential projects, ranging from ADUs and single-family homes to large-scale community developments. We value speed, clarity, and excellence. We are seeking a high-performance Executive Assistant who thrives in a fast-moving, execution-heavy environment.



Position Summary

The Executive Assistant (EA) will directly support the VP of Development / Chief Asset Management Officer with daily communications, scheduling, and rigorous execution follow-through. You will act as an operational partner, ensuring that land acquisition, project entitlement, and permitting tasks move forward without friction. This role requires exceptional organizational skills and a strong background in real estate development or architectural operations.



Key Responsibilities

1. Communication & Stakeholder Triage

- Manage and filter high-volume inboxes; draft concise, professional replies to city officials, architects, and contractors.

- Track correspondence with partners, consultants, and clients to ensure zero communication backlog.

- Maintain a professional tone in all high-stakes external communications.



2. Task & Project Management

- Maintain and update complex project trackers in Lark, Google Sheets, or Salesforce.

- Proactively follow up with internal teams and external consultants to ensure project milestones (permitting, site visits, and escrow) stay on schedule.

- Help implement and manage CRM or task automation systems to streamline project workflows.



3. Scheduling & Cross-Border Coordination

- Manage calendars across multiple entities and time zones (U.S.–Asia).

- Schedule internal team syncs, consultant meetings, site visits, and board meetings.

- Prepare detailed agendas and distribute "Action-Item" recap notes with a clear reminder system for all parties involved.



4. Document & Research Support

- Organize and maintain digital files (blueprints, permits, and reports) in Dropbox/Box.

- Assist in preparing project presentations, meeting briefs, and development progress summaries.

- Support real estate development research, including zoning analysis and city-specific ordinance tracking.



Qualifications

- Experience: Minimum 2+ years supporting senior executives in Real Estate Development, Architectural Design, Home Building or related fields.

- Industry Knowledge: Understanding of residential project flow (LOIs, pro formas, and permitting timelines).

- Tech Stack: High proficiency in Lark, Google Workspace,and Dropbox, Microsoft Suites, Canva and project management softwares.

- Language: Excellent written and spoken English

- Presence: Sharp, organized, detail-oriented, discreet, and proactive. 



Compensation & Structure

- Full-time remote role with partial Pacific Time overlap.

- Competitive base salary/retainer + performance bonuses.

- Long-term growth potential within the investment and operations leadership track.



 Submit your resume in a pdf format.

 communications, including sending notifications and responding to investor inquiries in a timely manner.

Scheduling and posting content across platforms

Following brand voice and content guidelines for each client



Requirements:



Fluent written and spoken English (very important)

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow instructions exactly

Experience with Canva, Adobe Photoshop, or Illustrator

Experience creating social media content (graphics + captions)

Reliable internet and ability to meet deadlines

Organized and able to manage multiple clients at once

Basic video editing (Reels, TikToks, etc.)



Compensation:

Perks:



Fully remote

Long-term opportunity with consistent work

Opportunity to grow with our team



Schedule:



This is a full-time role

Work schedule will be determined based on team and client needs



About Me:

How to Apply (IMPORTANT – Read Carefully):

 your application to:

, write 2–3 sentences only on:

, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.)

title: Logistics Support Representative
description:
Job Title: LTL Customer Support & Sales Representative

Location: [ Remote]

Job Type: Part-time to Full-Time

Department: Logistics / Sales





About the Role



We are seeking a motivated and customer-focused LTL (Less-Than-Truckload) Customer Support & Sales Representative to join our growing team. This role combines relationship management, operational support, and sales development. You’ll be the primary point of contact for customers, ensuring smooth shipment coordination while identifying opportunities to grow accounts and increase revenue. As well as the point of contact with LTL carriers.



Key Responsibilities



Customer Support

-Serve as the main contact for LTL customers via phone,
, and chat

-Assist with shipment booking, tracking, rate quotes, and issue resolution

-Proactively communicate delays, service updates, and delivery statuses

-Handle claims, billing inquiries, and service exceptions with professionalism





Sales & Account Growth

-Build and maintain strong relationships with existing customers

-Identify upselling and cross-selling opportunities within current accounts

-Generate and follow up on leads to acquire new LTL business

-Prepare and present rate quotes and service proposals

-Meet or exceed monthly sales and retention targets





Operations Coordination

-Work closely with carriers, dispatch, and internal teams to ensure on-time service

-Negotiate rates with carriers when needed to remain competitive

-Maintain accurate shipment and customer records in CRM/TMS systems

Qualifications

-1–3+ years of experience in LTL logistics, freight brokerage, or transportation (preferred)

-Strong understanding of LTL shipping processes, pricing, and carriers

-Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

-Sales-oriented mindset with a focus on customer satisfaction

-Ability to multitask and thrive in a fast-paced environment

-Proficiency in CRM and transportation management systems (TMS) is a plus





Key Skills

-Customer service excellence

-Negotiation and sales closing

-Problem-solving and conflict resolution

-Time management and organization

-Attention to detail





Compensation & Benefits

-Supportive and team-oriented work environment



Why Join Us?

Apply today to be part of a dynamic and fast-growing logistics team!

title: Part-Time Video Editor for YouTube Crochet & Macrame Tutorials
description:
I'm looking for a skilled video editor to help me edit my craft tutorial videos in Adobe Premiere Pro. I need someone who can cut footage down, remove awkward pauses, breaths, uhs and ums, add unobtrusive background music from my provided tracks, and generally make the editing process smoother for me.



Job Details:



Pay: $8/hour



Hours: Flexible and as-needed - work volume will vary. Some weeks may have a few videos, other weeks may have none. This is not a guaranteed set-hours position.



Commitment: Long-term for the right person - as we build a good working relationship I'd love to send more videos your way



Video Length: Final edited videos are typically 10-25 minutes long



Editing Time: My videos typically take me 2-4 hours to edit. I'd love for you to be able to work within that time frame or faster -- I'm not a professional editor so I imagine an experienced one could do it even more efficiently!



Responsibilities:



- Edit raw footage in Adobe Premiere Pro to create a rough cut



- Trim unnecessary parts, remove awkward pauses, filler words, and background noise interruptions



- Add unobtrusive background music from my provided track library (music should only play during non-speaking segments and must stay low and non-distracting)



- Make basic adjustments (color, exposure, etc. if needed)



- Deliver the complete Premiere project file (not just the exported video) so I can open it and make final tweaks myself



- Share and receive files via Google Drive



Requirements:



- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro

title: Accounting Assitant 38-40k Based on Experience
description:
About the Company:

Luxo Living is a proudly Australian-owned eCommerce and retail company, specialising in stylish furniture and home appliances. With over a thousand product launches across the country, we’ve become a trusted name for quality and affordability in Australian homes.

As we continue to grow, we’re on the lookout for a dynamic and motivated Accounts Officer to join our finance team. This is a fantastic opportunity for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, enjoys variety in their day, and is eager to grow alongside an innovative company.



About the Role:

This is a hands-on and diverse role where you'll play a key part in our finance operations. You’ll also have the opportunity to support our supply chain function as needed. We are particularly keen to hear from applicants with experience in Australian payroll, and a background in customer service would be highly regarded.



Your responsibilities will include:



•Maintaining and managing our billing system

•Recording and reconciling customer payments

•Verifying and processing purchase invoices

•Bank and credit card reconciliations

•Generating and issuing invoices

•Managing accounts receivable records and documentation

•Liaising with resellers and managing reseller accounts

•Investigating and resolving any account discrepancies or enquiries

•Supporting general administrative and accounting duties as required



What We’re Looking For:

•Degree qualified in Accounting or a related discipline

•Prior experience in a similar accounting role is highly desirable

•Experience in Australian payroll is essential

•Previous exposure to customer service will be considered an advantage

•Proficient in Microsoft Office and accounting software

•Meticulous attention to detail and a high level of accuracy

•Strong organisational and time management skills

•Ability to work effectively under pressure and meet deadlines

•Excellent communication skills and a collaborative attitude

•Reliable and fast internet access



Why Join Luxo Living?

•A Career, Not Just a Job

We’re not offering just another offshore contract — we’re offering a long-term career path. Our track record shows we retain offshore talent for many years through genuine growth opportunities and deep team integration. You won’t be treated as a remote contractor, but as a valued and essential part of the business.



•Career Development & Promotion Pathway

We’re growing rapidly and committed to promoting from within. Performing well in this role could open doors to expanded responsibilities, such as leadership roles or contributions across departments like supply chain or finance operations.



•Innovation-Driven Company (AI + Tech)

We’re not a stagnant eCommerce company. We invest heavily in AI and automation—from content optimisation to process efficiency. You’ll be part of a forward-thinking team that embraces experimentation and values smart innovation.



•Stable, Transparent, and Human Leadership

We believe in clarity, fairness, and consistent communication. There’s no red tape or micromanagement—we move fast, support each other, and get things done with purpose and collaboration.



•Remuneration

A competitive monthly remuneration package will be offered, with an industry-leading salary for the right candidate, based on experience and skillset.



If you’re ready to take the next step in your accounting career and contribute to a vibrant and growing company, we would love to hear from you!



???? Apply now by completing our online application form:

An environment that values creativity, initiative, and the "fail fast, learn faster" approach to innovation.

title: Crypto BD Partner - $10,000+ Potential in 90 Days
description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each



-  $500 bonus when your partnerships hit 25 Level 4 bonds

-  $2,000 bonus at 100 Level 4 bonds

-  $5,000 bonus at 300 Level 4 bonds

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

- Brief description of your crypto involvement



We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

title: Mortgage Closer US
description:
Home Access Financial (HAF) is a non-bank mortgage lender licensed across Florida, Georgia, North Carolina, South Carolina, Tennessee, Texas, and Pennsylvania — with active expansion underway. We are a fast-growing, process-driven company with a strong offshore team. Our loan origination platform is ICE Encompass, and we operate with a team-first mentality built on accountability, communication, and precision.



This is a long-term remote role for a professional who takes pride in clean closings and proactive communication. If you have a strong mortgage closing background and want to grow with a company that values your expertise, we want to hear from you.



What you will do

Manage the closing process end-to-end for conventional (FNMA/FHLMC), FHA, VA, and USDA loans from clear-to-close through funding

Order, review, and audit closing disclosures (CD) and final loan documents for accuracy and compliance

Coordinate with title companies, escrow agents, settlement agents, and realtors to schedule and confirm closing dates

Verify final figures (cash to close, prorations, lender credits) and confirm they match the approved loan terms

Communicate daily with borrowers and real estate agents to set expectations and resolve closing conditions

Enter, update, and track all closing milestones and documents inside ICE Encompass

Identify and resolve last-minute closing issues quickly and professionally

Ensure all required final conditions are satisfied prior to funding authorization

Confirm disbursement and wire instructions with the funding team

Support post-closing document collection as needed



Requirements

Minimum 3 years of mortgage closing experience at a U.S. lender

Hands-on experience with ICE Encompass — you must be able to work in the LOS from day one

Solid working knowledge of FNMA/FHLMC conventional loan guidelines and government loan types (FHA, VA, USDA)

Strong understanding of CD and TRID disclosure requirements

Familiarity with U.S. title, escrow, and settlement processes across multiple states

Excellent written and verbal English communication — you will interact directly with U.S. borrowers and agents

Ability to work EST business hours (approximately 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Eastern)

Reliable internet connection and a dedicated, quiet workspace

Detail-oriented, organized, and able to manage multiple files simultaneously under deadline pressure



Nice to have

Prior experience supporting multi-state mortgage operations

Background in post-closing, funding, or QC (helpful for cross-functional coverage)



Compensation and setup

$1,000 USD per month, paid consistently

Full-time, remote — work from your home office

EST business hours required for team alignment

Long-term position with a stable, growing lender

Collaborative team environment with U.S.-based management and an established Philippines VA team



How to apply

Please apply with the following:



Your updated resume highlighting your mortgage closing experience

A brief cover letter describing your Encompass experience and the loan types you have closed

Your internet speed test result (run at 
 or speedtest.net)

Applications without Encompass experience or a cover letter will not be reviewed. We move quickly on strong candidates.

title: Video Editor needed for regular, ongoing work
description:
THE COMPANY

Avalon Creative Group is a dynamic and innovative company headquartered in the heart of the San Francisco Bay Area and Silicon Valley in California. We specialize in the creation of captivating and immersive content for corporate clients, offering comprehensive content design, production, and creative services. Working with Avalon Creative Group presents an exciting opportunity for individuals seeking to collaborate with renowned brands, while also offering a continuous learning environment that fosters personal and professional growth.



JOB DESCRIPTION

Avalon Creative Group is seeking a talented and experienced video editor and 3D animator based in the Philippines to work with us as an independent contractor. Our work includes videos to inspire audiences at corporate events, on-demand marketing webinars, internal corporate training and sales enablement, product demos, highlight reels, social media ads, interviews, customer testimonials and more.



Our goal is to establish a long term working relationship with a creative, reliable and ambitious video professional. After successfully completing an initial trial period, the right person will become an integral member of our creative team on a full-time contract basis.



RESPONSIBILITIES

> Edit high quality videos from a variety of sources, including single-camera, multi-camera, stock footage, AI generated video, graphic elements, music, sound effects, etc.

> Effectively and efficiently generate video footage and elements using the latest AI tools

> Manage accuracy and correction of color and audio

> Understand and apply corporate branding and style guidelines and templates (MOGRTs)

> Manage, organize and backup video assets and deliverables, including raw footage, graphics, sound files, stock footage, projects, files, etc.

> Adhere to budgeted time constraints while incorporating client feedback and changes through multiple rounds of review and revisions

> Contribute to and consistently apply efficient workflow processes and standards (SOPs)

> Document guidelines and process details for tea
mbers and clients

> Pursue ongoing professional development and skill enhancements



REQUIRED SKILLS

> Having a proven track record of punctuality, reliability and professionalism is essential

> Excellent attention to detail and adeptness at managing multiple concurrent projects is required

> Strong communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a remote team environment

> English fluency (written and spoken) along with excellent communication skills are essential

> You must be based in the Philippines with fast, reliable internet access and a robust computer

> You must have a quiet workspace where you can work without distractions and join Zoom calls



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE

> At least 2 years of professional experience and proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite, specifically Premiere Pro and After Effects

> Bonus if you have experience or proficiency with using 3D software like Blender, Cinema4D, or anything similar.

> You must have strong creative skills and a portfolio of work that demonstrates your passion and experience with video editing and motion graphics

>> Your portfolio must include examples of the type of work listed in the job description section

> Expertise in video editing fundamentals and techniques, including pacing, storytelling, and continuity

> Knowledge of different video formats and codecs for various delivery platforms



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE

> 5 years of experience with Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects.

> At least 2 years of experience and proficiency with Blender or Cinema 4D.

> Proficiency in color correction, audio editing, and mastering

> Familiarity with team communication and project management tools like Smartsheet, Slack, ClickUp, or similar platforms

> Familiarity or experience using AI post-production tools

> Strong understanding of visual composition, typography, and graphic design principles

> Completion of training and/or certifications in key software used

> Knowledge of social media platforms and video encoding specifications for each platform



COMPENSATION & ENGAGEMENT

> Compensation rate for full-time, independent contractor will be $1000 - $1300 USD per month

> Ten paid holidays and ten days of accrued paid time off (PTO) will be included annually

> Rate will be based on qualifications and experience

> This is a remote work position

> Work hours will need to overlap with standard business hours in California (9:00-6:00pm PT)



HOW TO APPLY

If you are interested in working with us as an independent contractor and you meet the required qualifications listed above, please APPLY HERE -

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
How to apply: Please send a 2 to 3-minute video introduction highlighting your experience as a VA and why you may be a good fit for the position. Send videos to 



About Us:

We are an innovative and fast-growing rental car company based in Charlotte, NC, focused on providing gig workers with affordable, convenient, and no-hassle transportation solutions. Our leadership team is driven, ambitious, and passionate about achieving the company’s long-term vision of removing all barriers to affordable transportation. As we continue to scale, we are looking for a talented Virtual Assistant to support us and help implement efficiency and organization in a fast-paced environment.



Position Overview:

As the Virtual Assistant, you will be a key player in ensuring our administrative and back-office tasks are completed daily and weekly. This role requires a proactive and adaptable individual ready to handle various responsibilities, including managing calendars, logging daily payments, sending payment reminders, creating and maintaining maintenance logs, receiving and making calls on the company’s behalf, and more. The right candidate will possess a “startup mindset”—enthusiastic, flexible, and eager to tackle new challenges head-on.



Responsibilities

 Management: Respond promptly to customer
s, ensuring timely and professional communication.

Rental Agreement Creation: Prepare and send rental and renewal agreements, ensuring all documentation is accurate and complete.

Payment Tracking: Monitor customer payments, log transactions, and follow up on outstanding balances.

Signature and Payment Requests: Send reminders and requests for signatures and payments to customers, helping ensure timely compliance. Please use the words top-notch VA in your subject line and in your video introduction to show attention to detail. 



Data Entry and Management: Maintain accurate and organized records, ensuring data integrity across platforms.

Customer Service Assistance: Provide exceptional support to customers by addressing inquiries and concerns.

General Administrative Support: Perform other administrative duties as assigned to support the company’s goals.



Skills & Qualifications:

2+ years of experience as an Executive Assistant or in a similar administrative role, preferably in a fast-paced environment.

Exceptional organizational skills with strong attention to detail.

Ability to multitask and prioritize in a dynamic environment.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

High level of discretion and confidentiality in handling sensitive matters.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, Google Workspace, CRM and project management tools (Asana)

Ability to take initiative and work independently.

A positive attitude, adaptability, and a problem-solving mindset.

Experience in a startup or entrepreneurial environment is a plus.



Why Join Us?:

Be part of a fast-growing company with opportunities for advancement.

Competitive salary

Flexible work environment.

title: Mortgage processor
description:
Home Access Financial (HAF) is a non-bank residential mortgage lender licensed in Florida, Georgia, North Carolina, South Carolina, Tennessee, Texas, and Pennsylvania — with active expansion underway. We close conventional, government, and non-QM loans and are known for a disciplined, process-driven operation with strong support for our team.



Our loan origination system is ICE Encompass. We have an established Philippines-based VA team and U.S.-based management. This is a long-term, full-time remote role for a seasoned processor who can work independently, communicate clearly with borrowers and loan officers, and move loans efficiently from submission to clear-to-close.



What you will do

Own the processing pipeline from loan submission through clear-to-close across conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, and non-QM products

Review loan files for completeness, accuracy, and compliance upon receipt from the loan officer

Order and track third-party services — appraisals, title, flood certs, HOA certs, payoff statements, and verifications of employment

Collect, review, and stack all borrower documentation including income, assets, credit, and identity

Analyze income documentation (W-2s, paystubs, tax returns, bank statements) for eligibility and AUS accuracy

Submit complete loan packages to underwriting and respond to all conditions in a timely manner

Communicate proactively with borrowers, loan officers, realtors, and title companies throughout the loan lifecycle

Maintain accurate and up-to-date loan status, milestones, and document tracking in ICE Encompass

Identify and escalate file issues or timeline risks early to prevent closing delays

Ensure all disclosures, change of circumstance (COC) notices, and TRID timelines are met



Requirements

Minimum 3 years of residential mortgage processing experience at a U.S. lender or broker

Hands-on experience with ICE Encompass — must be able to operate independently in the LOS from day one

Demonstrated experience processing conventional (FNMA/FHLMC) and government loans (FHA, VA, USDA)

Working knowledge of AUS findings (DU and/or LP) and the ability to read and respond to underwriting conditions

Strong understanding of TRID, disclosure timing requirements, and COC procedures

Ability to analyze standard income types: W-2 employment, self-employment (1040s/1120S/K-1s), and rental income

Excellent written and verbal English — you will communicate directly with U.S. borrowers and real estate agents

Ability to work EST business hours (approximately 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Eastern)

Reliable high-speed internet and a dedicated, distraction-free workspace

Organized, deadline-driven, and able to manage 20+ active files simultaneously



Nice to have

Experience processing non-QM products such as bank statement, DSCR, or asset depletion loans

Familiarity with multi-state mortgage operations and state-specific compliance requirements

Prior experience working with a remote or offshore processing team

Background in closing, funding, or post-closing (helpful for file handoff coordination)



Compensation and setup

$1,000 USD per month, paid consistently

Full-time remote — work from your home office

EST business hours required for team alignment with U.S. loan officers and management

Long-term position with a stable, growing lender — we are not looking for short-term contractors

Supportive team environment with an experienced VA team and responsive U.S.-based management

How to apply

Please submit the following with your application:



Your updated resume with a clear summary of your mortgage processing experience and loan types handled

A brief cover letter describing your Encompass experience, the volume of loans you have processed, and any non-QM products you have worked with

Your internet speed test result (run at 
 or speedtest.net)



Applications without Encompass experience clearly noted or without a cover letter will not be reviewed. Strong candidates will be contacted promptly.

title: FMCSA Safety & DOT Compliance Specialist
description:
About the Company



We are a growing U.S.-based trucking and logistics company working with major freight brokers across the United States. We are looking for a detail-oriented Safety & Compliance Specialist who understands FMCSA regulations and DOT compliance requirements to support our safety department.



This role is fully remote and requires working during U.S. business hours.



Responsibilities



• Maintain and organize Driver Qualification Files (DQF)

• Monitor and review MVR reports and driver records

• Manage FMCSA Clearinghouse compliance

• Track and maintain DOT drug & alcohol program requirements

• Ensure compliance with FMCSA regulations and safety policies

• Assist with ELD / Hours of Service (HOS) monitoring

• Prepare documentation for DOT audits and safety reviews

• Maintain driver training and safety documentation

• Communicate with drivers and internal team regarding safety issues



Requirements



• Experience working with U.S. trucking companies preferred

• Knowledge of FMCSA regulations and DOT compliance

• Experience with Driver Qualification Files (DQF)

• Familiarity with ELD systems and Hours of Service rules

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Good English communication skills

• Ability to work U.S. time zone



Nice to Have



• Experience with Samsara, Motive (KeepTruckin), or Geotab ELD

• Experience preparing companies for DOT audits

• Knowledge of IFTA / IRP compliance



What We Offer



• Long-term stable position

• Work directly with a U.S. trucking company

• Growth opportunities in safety and compliance management

• Competitive salary based on experience



How to Apply



Please include:



• Resume

• Description of your experience with FMCSA / DOT compliance

• Example of safety or compliance work you have done for a trucking company

title: STR Pricing & Revenue Manager (PriceLabs Expert)
description:
I’m looking for an experienced Short-Term Rental Pricing & Revenue Manager to help optimize and manage pricing across my current portfolio of 4 Airbnb listings (with plans to scale).

This role will focus on maximizing revenue through strategic use of PriceLabs, market analysis, and ongoing pricing optimization.

- Set up and import new listings into PriceLabs as we expand into new markets

- Optimize pricing strategies for each listing (base price, min/max, dynamic settings, etc.)

- Conduct daily/weekly pricing reviews to ensure rates are aligned with: Seasonality, Last-minute demand, Far-out bookings, Local events and market trends

- Identify opportunities to increase revenue and occupancy

- Provide proactive recommendations to improve performance across all listings



? Requirements:

- Proven experience using PriceLabs (required)

- Strong understanding of STR pricing strategy and revenue management
