- Experience with Airbnb or STR platforms preferred

- Detail-oriented and proactive communicator



Compensation:

- Flexible based on experience

- Hours and workload will vary depending on portfolio size and systems in place

title: Full Time Video Editor (Viral Clipping Specialist)
description:
We are hiring a Video Editor with strong viral clipping instincts, not just someone who edits, but someone who understands what makes content perform.



???? What We’re Looking For



We need someone who can:



-Watch long-form content in its entirety

-Identify viral, promotional, and sales-driven moments

-Clip content that has a high likelihood of: Going viral, Driving engagement and Converting viewers into followers or customers





This includes:

-Cutting 3–4 minute segments from about 20-minute YouTube videos

-Creating clips that are strategic, not random





?? Important:

We are NOT looking for someone who relies on tools like Opus Clip or automated clipping software.

We already use these tools, and we can tell immediately when someone is shortcutting the process. You will be disqualified.



???? What You Must Understand

This role requires:

A deep understanding of virality



Strong awareness of branding, tone, and voice



The ability to study and adapt to our brand





You should:

Follow the “30 Rule” for Instagram





Study our competitors:



What’s going viral?

Why is it going viral?

How can we replicate or improve it?



Clip accordingly with intention and strategy



We are looking for someone with a sharp eye, strong instincts, and attention to detail, not just technical editing skills.



 Job Structure

Starts as part-time



Moves into a well-paid full-time role if you prove capability



If you’re good, this will turn into a serious, long-term opportunity.



???? Read This Carefully (Disqualification Rules)

Do NOT auto-apply, those applications will not be reviewed





Do NOT submit incomplete information





If you don’t follow instructions, you will be:



Ignored

Deleted

Blocked



We take this seriously, and we expect you to as well.



???? How to Apply

Message us with:



Your Name



Job Title: Video Editor, Clipping Content



Your Portfolio (who you’ve worked with)



A short paragraph explaining:



1.) What you understand about our brand

2.) Why you’re a good fit

3.) Your WhatsApp number so we can contact you.





?? If ANY of this is missing, your application will not be considered.

title: Grade 5 Math Tutor (Remote)
description:
Location: Remote (PST Time Zone)

Schedule: 5:00 PM PST, 1-hour session per day (Monday - Thursday)



Job Description:

We are looking for a reliable and enthusiastic Grade 5 Math Tutor to work with a 10-year-old student. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of Grade 5 math concepts, including arithmetic, fractions, decimals, geometry, and introductory algebra.



The tutor will be responsible for helping the student improve their math skills by explaining concepts, providing practice problems, and supporting their overall academic development.



Responsibilities:

Provide 1-hour tutoring sessions focused on Grade 5 math topics, Monday through Thursday.

Explain math concepts in a clear, patient, and engaging manner.

Assist with homework and practice problems.

Adapt teaching methods to fit the student’s learning style and pace.

Track progress and give feedback on performance.

Foster a positive and encouraging learning environment.



Requirements:

Experience tutoring math at the elementary school level (preferably Grade 5).

Strong knowledge of the U.S. Grade 5 Math Curriculum (arithmetic, fractions, decimals, geometry, and basic algebra).

Reliable and consistent availability for 1-hour sessions at 5:00 PM PST, Monday through Thursday.

Excellent communication skills with the ability to work effectively with children.

A positive and patient attitude toward teaching.



Compensation:

Starting rate: $6/hour.

Rate increase to $7/hour after 30 days of successful tutoring.



How to Apply:

If you're passionate about helping a student succeed in math and meet the above qualifications, please apply by sending:



- Your resume.

- A brief description of your tutoring experience.

- A video link introduction telling us about your teaching style and why you would be a good fit for this role.

- A portfolio (if applicable), including any reviews from past clients, and relevant materials or examples of previous tutoring work.

- Include the word "MDN" when submitting an application to be considered. For example: Grade 5 Math Tutor - MDN



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant

Full-Time | 30–40 Hours/Week

Extreme Ownership | Growth-Minded | Mission-Driven



Ready to Be More Than “Just a VA”?



At InspireLife365, we help high-achieving women move from overthinking and burnout into clarity, confidence, and emotional self-leadership through coaching, speaking, masterclasses, and transformational programs.



We’re looking for a high-performing Virtual Assistant who wants to build a career, not just fill a role.



This is for someone who thrives on ownership, loves systems, communicates beautifully, thinks critically, and wants to help grow a meaningful brand with real impact.  If you’re proactive, techy, strategic, creative, and excited to help build something bigger than yourself, we want to meet you.



Who We Want



You take ownership.

You solve problems before they escalate.

You think ahead.

You care deeply about excellence.

You are tech-savvy, people-focused, and highly resourceful.



You’re someone who:



Takes 100% responsibility for your work

Learns quickly and adapts fast

Communicates with professionalism and warmth

Has excellent spoken and written English

Loves creating order out of moving parts

Balances creativity with strong systems thinking

Wants long-term growth with a mission-driven company



This Is NOT for You If You:



Need constant reminders or close supervision

Wait to be told every next step

Miss deadlines or lack follow-through

Resist feedback or changing priorities

Are looking for a short-term side gig



What You’ll Do



Daily Responsibilities:

Organize and maintain inbox daily; keep communication timely and professional

Respond promptly to leads, clients, partners, and vendors

Manage calendar scheduling, appointments, reminders, and meeting coordination

Maintain CRM and client records accurately

Track tasks, deadlines, and moving priorities



Lead Follow-Up & Client Care:

Follow up with discovery call leads, webinar registrants, warm prospects, and speaking inquiries

Ensure no lead falls through the cracks

Track lead conversations and nurture pipelines

Follow up on unpaid invoices, reminders, and client onboarding steps



Social Media & Visibility:

Create branded graphics in Canva

Write, schedule, and publish social media posts across multiple platforms

Repurpose long-form content into reels, shorts, captions, quote graphics, and stories

Help shape compelling story-driven content that increases visibility and authority



Weekly Responsibilities:

Marketing & Content Support

Draft and schedule newsletters

Format and publish blogs

Create lead magnets, PDFs, and downloadable resources

Upload podcasts, YouTube videos, and short-form clips



Systems & Automations:

Build and maintain automations in GoHighLevel

Set up workflows,
 nurture campaigns, reminders, and trigger sequences

Improve backend systems and identify inefficiencies proactively



Launch & Funnel Support:

Build and edit landing pages, registration pages, opt-in pages, and sales pages in GoHighLevel

Support launch setup for webinars, masterclasses, and coaching programs



Visibility Outreach:

Research podcast, summit, media, and speaking opportunities

Send 50 customized outreach pitches weekly for podcasts, speaking engagements, interviews, and partnerships

Maintain outreach tracker and follow up consistently on all submissions



Reporting & Metrics:

Track weekly KPIs including:

Leads generated

Webinar registrations

 open/click rates

Social media engagement

Conversion metrics

Submit weekly performance reports



Monthly:

Support launch campaigns and event logistics

Coordinate webinar reminders, replay
s, and follow-up communication

Create presentations for speaking engagements and workshops

Audit automations and recommend process improvements

Update SOPs and recurring workflows



Tools You’ll Use or Master:

Canva

GoHighLevel

Google Workspace

Zoom

Meta Business Suite

Trello

Descript

YouTube Studio



Bonus If You Know:

Zapier

ChatGPT / AI tools

Funnel builders

Basic video editing



Traits We Value Most:

Fiercely self-motivated and independent

Strategic thinker and critical problem-solver

Excellent written and verbal communicator

Detail-oriented and systems-minded

Creative eye for branding and design

Fast learner who adapts quickly

Proud to represent a mission-driven brand



What Success Looks Like:

Inbox stays organized and communication is handled promptly

Leads are followed up with consistently and professionally

Social media remains polished, visible, and on-brand

Content is published on schedule

Automations run smoothly with fewer manual gaps

Launches and events feel seamless

Systems improve every month

You fully own your role and leadership trusts you



Growth Path



Opportunities to advance into:



Operations Manager

Launch Manager

Marketing & Visibility Manager

Project Manager



We invest in people who grow with us.



Why Join InspireLife365?

Long-term, stable opportunity

Real leadership growth potential

High trust and autonomy

Meaningful, purpose-driven work

A true seat at the table in a growing brand

Growth opportunities and bonuses based on performance



You won’t just support the business.

You’ll help shape its future.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



Complete the OnlineJobs.ph Application

In your message include:



A brief introduction and your background

What you do best as a Virtual Assistant

Brands or businesses you’ve supported

Tools/platforms you know best

Why you’re the perfect fit for this role

Bonus:  Include the word OVERFLOW somewhere in your application.



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.

title: Social Media Guru
description:
Job Title: Social Media Manager / Social Media Guru



Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time



Job Overview:



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Social Media Manager (Social Media Guru) who has deep expertise across all major social media platforms and a strong understanding of digital marketing strategies. This role is responsible for building brand presence, driving engagement, generating leads, and executing high-impact social media campaigns.



The ideal candidate is both strategic and hands-on, with excellent communication skills and a passion for staying ahead of social media trends.



Key Responsibilities:

Develop and execute comprehensive social media strategies across platforms 
, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.).

Manage end-to-end content creation, including planning, writing, editing, and posting.

Build and grow brand presence, engagement, and follower base across all channels.

Plan and launch campaigns focused on lead generation, brand awareness, and conversions.

Monitor social media trends, tools, and best practices to keep strategies fresh and competitive.

Analyze performance metrics and optimize campaigns based on data insights.

title: AI Tools, Research & Operations Manager — American Political Strategy Firm
description:
LOVE WORKING WITH AI TOOLS

AND GROW YOUR OPERATIONAL MANAGEMENT EXPERIENCE?



Work directly with an experienced American political strategist who is genuinely invested in your growth.

Build real, marketable skills in AI, digital marketing, SEO, political research, and operations management.



THIS JOB IS DIFFERENT

You’ll use Claude, Gemini, Google AI Studio, and NotebookLM as everyday professional tools. We want someone who follows AI developments the way others follow sports — keeping up with new features, watching tutorials, and reading release notes because they find it genuinely interesting, not because it’s required.



You don’t need to arrive knowing everything. You need to be curious, resourceful, and the kind of person who likes to figure things out. Many of these skills can be learned quickly using AI tools — and we’ll show you how.



AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITY

AI Tools and Knowledge Management

Organize AI research systems, help set up workflows in Google Workspace using AI tools, build prompt libraries, and stay current on new AI features and bring them to our work.



SEO and Website

Competitive research, keyword updates, and website improvements using AI tools. No prior SEO experience required — if you know how to use AI, you can learn this quickly.



Research and Business Development

Research political candidates, opponents, and markets — backgrounds, key issues, online presence, and campaign activity. Build prospect lists, monitor candidate announcements, and help identify where we should be growing.



Digital Advertising

Learn our digital advertising platform and help coordinate campaigns across social, streaming, and programmatic channels.



CRM and Workflow Automation

Manage and maintain our Zoho CRM — data cleanup, imports, and automated workflows. Experience with any major CRM is helpful; Zoho can be learned on the job.



Data Analytics

Work with large databases—filtering, sorting, analyzing, and exporting datasets to support client campaigns. Training on our specific platforms is provided.



Operations and Administration Management

Maintain a master task list for all active projects, handle invoicing and billing, supervise a small staff, and keep Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, and Sheets) organized.



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF

You follow AI news and new tool releases on your own time — genuinely.

You like figuring things out on your own.

You keep things organized without being reminded.

You’re interested in U.S. politics or willing to learn about it.

You want to build skills in AI, marketing, and operations that will serve you for years.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF

You need a predictable, rigid schedule.

You prefer to wait for direction rather than take initiative.

You’re not genuinely curious about AI and new technologies.



COMPENSATION

$6–$7 USD per hour, depending on experience

30–40 hours per week

Hours increase during peak election months

Profit split at the end of each election cycle — in strong years, this has been a life-changing bonus

Professional AI tool subscriptions provided



QUALIFICATIONS

Excellent English, spoken and written

Demonstrated experience with AI tools used in real work — you’ve gone beyond basic prompting and actually organized, customized, or built something with AI

Data analytics experience — comfortable filtering, sorting, and working with large data sets

Strong Google Sheets, Docs, and Drive skills; full Google Workspace experience a plus

CRM and SEO experience helpful but not required

Available approximately 2–11 AM Philippine Time

Able to commit through November 2026, with the possibility to continue



RECENT GRADUATES WELCOME. Demonstrated AI curiosity and strong English matter more than years of experience.



ABOUT PRECISION POLITICS

American based Democratic political strategy and advertising firm. 400-plus campaign wins. 94% win rate. 24 National POLLIE Awards. You’ll work directly with the firm’s owner, a nationally recognized strategist and former Chief of Staff to a U.S. mayor.



HOW TO APPLY

Begin your subject line with the word OPERATIONS — this confirms that you read the posting and can follow directions.



ATTACH YOUR RESUME AND INCLUDE A COVER LETTER:

Why does this role interest you?

Why are you qualified for this position?

What relevant experience do you have from jobs, education, or independent projects?

Which AI tools do you use, and what have you built or organized with them?

What is the most recent AI feature or tool you discovered on your own?

Can you work between 2–11 AM Philippine Time on a regular basis?



FINALISTS WILL BE ASKED TO COMPLETE A SKILLS TEST.

English writing and editing

AI prompting and data extraction

Google Sheets and data cleaning

Research tasks

CRM workflow scenario

take initiative,

title: Hiring a full-time content writer for growing SEO agency (good pay + holidays + raises)
description:
We are Notebook, an SEO agency that works with premium clients in various industries ranging from law and health to government institutions.



We are currently looking for a full-time writer (~50,000-60,000+ words per month) to join our growing team. You'll be expected to write about 1 full blog per day with AI assistance, perhaps more depending on the length. For example, if the blog is 2,200 words, that should cover a full day, but if it's 1,500, we would expect the blog to be completed and for you to begin the next one. Again, you will have outlines and AI assistance, so it is not as intensive as writing from scratch.



This is a demanding but rewarding role that will be well-paid, with the possibility of bonuses and raises as well as promotions to new positions for top performers.



You will be provided detailed content briefs as well as client specific projects and agents to aid you in your job. There will also be a dedicated editor to check the quality of your work and offer feedback to help you improve.



This is not an easy job, but it pays well, and there will be bonuses, raises, and paid time off.



Specs:

Salary Range: ~$1,000 per month depending on your capabilities and experience. We are willing to go a bit higher for an ideal candidate.

Hours per week: ~40

Location: Remote

Hours: Flexible, but we will confirm a set time frame where we expect you to be available where our schedules overlap for communication purposes (to be decided later)



Responsibilities: 



Your responsibilities will be as follows:

- Write articles that meet our strict content quality standards

- Understand direct, straightforward SEO writing principles

- Take feedback from your editor and improve

- Understand SEO optimization, such as entity usage and keyword optimization

- Be in contact with our team via (Slack)



Perks:

- Flexible hours

- Time off

- Salary raises over time



We're looking for a content writer who doesn't just take basic AI output and submit it. 



If you want to just paste in an outline and say generate, this is not the job for you. 



If you're hungry to learn, want to join a growing business, and are looking for steady, long-term work, this is the job for you. If you can look at a piece of content, assess its quality, add value to it, and make sure it sounds human, even better.



Our company offers a fair salary, room to grow, plenty of work, and bonuses for performance. 



Qualifications



You must:

- Speak and write in English at a high level

- Must understand SEO on-page basics

- Write clear, human-sounding, engaging content

- Write entity-dense, no fluff content that still sounds human and provides value

- Understand how to talk to AI to aid in research and generation



For this position, you MUST complete the application form found in the following form (copy URL):







Please fill in this form and we will respond if we are interested. 



NOTE: There is a writing test attached to the job application. Make a copy for yourself, complete it, and link us to it.

title: Recruiter

Pool Cleaning Technician Recruiter

Summit Pool Works — Rockwall, TX (Remote)

Part-time or Full-time | Remote / Offshore



About the Role

Summit Pool Works is a growing pool service company based in the Dallas–Fort Worth area. We're hiring a remote recruiter to own our technician hiring pipeline from start to finish. You'll source, screen, and schedule candidates for pool cleaning technician roles so the owner can focus on operations and growth. This is a high-impact role — our ability to scale depends directly on having reliable technicians in the field.



What You'll Do



Post and manage job listings on Indeed, ZipRecruiter,
 Jobs, Craigslist, and other relevant platforms

Source candidates proactively through job boards,
 groups, and local community boards in the Dallas–Fort Worth area

Screen applicants via phone or video call to assess reliability, experience, and fit

Conduct initial interviews and score candidates against a provided checklist

Coordinate and schedule interviews between candidates and the owner

Follow up with candidates throughout the hiring process to maintain engagement

Maintain a running candidate tracker (Google Sheets or CRM) with status, notes, and next steps

Send offer letters and onboarding paperwork using provided templates

Build a warm pipeline of candidates even when no immediate opening exists

Report weekly on applications received, screens completed, and pipeline status





Requirements



2+ years of recruiting, HR, or talent acquisition experience

Experience hiring for hourly, trade, or field service roles (landscaping, cleaning, pest control, HVAC, or similar a big plus)

Comfortable making outbound calls and conducting phone screens in English

Strong written English for job postings, candidate communications, and offer letters

Highly organized — able to manage multiple candidates at different stages simultaneously

Familiar with Indeed, ZipRecruiter,
 Jobs, or similar platforms

Reliable internet with a backup connection





Nice to Have



Experience recruiting in the Dallas–Fort Worth or broader Texas market

Familiarity with the pool, landscaping, or home services industry

Experience with applicant tracking systems (ATS) or CRM tools

Bilingual English/Spanish — a significant advantage given the local labor market





Compensation & Schedule



Pay: $500–$900/month depending on experience

Hours: Part-time to full-time depending on hiring volume; overlap with CST business hours preferred for candidate calls

Start: ASAP





Tools We Use

Google Sheets, Google Meet, Slack, Indeed, ZipRecruiter,
 Jobs, Gmail



How to Apply

Begin your application with the phrase "Deep End Ready" to confirm you read this post. Then include:

Applications without relevant recruiting experience will not be considered.

title: Employer Outreach Specialist
description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE



You will contact US employers on behalf of specific O-1 visa talent candidates registered on our

platform. When an extraordinary person — an engineer, researcher, artist, or athlete — needs a

US employer to write them an interest letter for their visa petition, you are the one who finds that

employer and makes it happen. You will reach out to companies by
, LinkedIn, and phone,

explain what O1DMatch is, introduce the specific candidate, and walk the employer through

signing up and sending an interest letter. This is an outreach and relationship role. You need to

be confident communicating with US businesses, comfortable with rejection, and consistent with

follow-up.



WHAT YOU WILL DO DAY-TO-DAY

• Review talent profiles on the O1DMatch platform and identify employers who would be a

strong match for each candidate

• Reach out to US employers via
, LinkedIn, and phone on behalf of specific talent

candidates

• Explain the O-1 visa process and what an employer interest letter is — and why it costs

the employer nothing and creates no legal burden

• Guide interested employers to sign up on O1DMatch and send an interest letter to the

candidate

• Follow up consistently with employers who have not yet responded

• Log all outreach activity and employer responses in our CRM database

• Coordinate with the Talent Liaison to keep candidates updated on outreach progress

• Report weekly on outreach numbers, response rates, and interest letters secured

SKILLS & EXPERIENCE WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• Excellent written and spoken English — you will be
ing and speaking directly with

US businesses

• Experience with cold
 outreach, LinkedIn outreach, or B2B sales and recruitment

tasks

• Comfortable making phone calls to US businesses during US business hours

• Ability to explain a complex process like O-1 visas and interest letters in simple, clear

language

• Organized and able to track many employer conversations at the same time

• Familiarity with CRM tools or spreadsheet-based pipeline tracking

• Self-motivated and disciplined — you manage your own outreach pipeline without being

reminded



NICE TO HAVE

• Prior experience in recruitment, business development, or immigration-adjacent work



• Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo.io, or similar prospecting tools

• Basic knowledge of US visa types, especially O-1, H-1B, or employment-based

immigration



IMPORTANT NOTE

This role requires availability during US Eastern or Central time hours for employer calls and

follow-up.



HOW TO APPLY

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph. Please include the following in your application message: (1) a

brief description of any outreach, sales, research, or client-facing work you have done

previously, (2) your English proficiency level and any relevant examples, and (3) your availability

to work during US Eastern or Central time hours. Applications that do not include these details

may not be reviewed.

title: Data Scientist / ML Engineer
description:
Location: Remote (Global) Time Commitment: ~20 hours/week (Flexible hours, strict deadlines) Compensation: Hourly (USD) + Performance Bonuses



We are a fast growing boutique consulting firm based in Toronto and we are in the business of helping American software companies win. From US-based SaaS platforms to crypto trading firms and anything in-between.



We are looking for a Data Scientist who loves to code to join our team.



We are looking for someone who enjoys the "builder" side of data science. You are the kind of person who enjoys writing clean Python scripts to clean and model data, and even create streamlit apps to stand them up.



You will be working directly with the Founder (Robert), effectively acting as his technical right hand. If you are sharp, curious, and want to work on projects that actually move the needle, we’d love to meet you.



What You’ll Be Working On



Our projects vary, which keeps things interesting! You might:



Automate Analysis: Write scripts (Python preferred) that take messy raw data and turn it into clean, structured insights or formatted Excel reports.



Build Predictive Models: Help us test hypotheses—like figuring out which crypto assets might dip—using statistical methods or machine learning.



Create Tools: Occasionally help us build simple calculators or internal tools so non-technical people can use your models.



Visualize Data: Create clear, honest charts that tell the truth about the data (we value "high data-to-ink ratio").



Who We Are Looking For



You don't need to be a "Product Manager" or a "Business Guru"—we handle the strategy. We need someone who is technically fluent and can execute ideas quickly.



The Must-Haves:



You are a coder at heart: You are very, very capable in your language of choice (we strongly prefer Python, but if you are a wizard in R, we are open to it). You aren't a "tourist" in code; you know how to write clean, logical functions. You can work at the speed of thought and use AI to help you intelligently too (i.e. without totally outsourcing your thinking to it).



You are "Super Sharp": You catch details others miss. You notice when a number looks wrong before you send the report.



Fluent English (C2): We collaborate a lot. You need to be able to explain how your code works or why a model is giving a certain result in clear English. Accents are welcome but we need to be able to understand you.



Data Intuition: You understand that data isn't just numbers—it represents real-world behavior (churn, revenue, usage).



The "Nice-to-Haves" (Bonus Points):



Experience with Streamlit or similar tools: If you know how to spin up a quick web app to show off your work, that’s a huge plus.



LLM / AI Interest: Familiarity with using ChatGPT/Claude APIs to clean data or speed up workflows. Big bonus for creating langchain/n8n like tools for modern LLM pipeline processing (high code low code are all fine)



Sophisticated Machine Learning: Experience using various models for predictive analytics (time series, categorical, and so on) and sourcing cleaning the data for modelling.



How to Apply



Please reply with:



Your "Builder" Story: Tell us about a time you used code to solve a boring or difficult problem. Did you automate a spreadsheet? Build a script to scrape data? (1 short paragraph)



(optional) Your "Analyst" Story: What is the most interesting insight you’ve found in a dataset? Or, what is the most interesting technical project you've worked on? (1 short paragraph)



A White Tiger: Please attach or link a picture of a white tiger so we know you read the whole post! :)
salary: USD 7-15 / hour paid on a fixed basis

title: Long-Form Editor Needed!
description:
Most video editors can’t do this.



And that’s not an insult…



It’s just reality.





If your entire skillset is:



- Adding captions

- Zoom cuts every 2 seconds

- Throwing random B-roll on top of talking heads

- Matching words to text like karaoke



This is NOT for you.



Seriously… don’t apply.





Because what we’re building requires a completely different brain.





What we actually need (read this twice):



In short someone who can edit like this:


/watch?v=zIN5dGq5Wjs


/watch?v=D3lhrrXb4WI&t=92s



We’re looking for a long-form video editor who can:



Zoom OUT before they zoom in



Understand the point of a video before touching the timeline



Edit with intention… not decoration



Tie every cut, visual, and pacing decision back to a bigger narrative



This is NOT about making things “more engaging” with noise.



This is about making things more compelling with structure.





Here’s the problem we keep running into…



Editors who come from short-form think:



“More visuals = better edit”



So what happens?



- Every sentence gets a caption

- Every 3 seconds gets a cut

- Every idea gets drowned in unnecessary B-roll



And the final product?



Feels busy… but empty.



Looks edited… but not thought through.



We don’t want that.





What great looks like to us:



You watch a 20-minute video…



And you’re not thinking about transitions or effects…



You’re locked into the story.



Everything feels intentional.



Every cut earns its place.



The pacing breathes.



And when it ends…



You remember the message.





This role is for you if:



You’ve edited long-form content (10+ minutes) like:



- YouTube videos

- Podcast videos



And more importantly…



You think in:



- Narrative arcs

- Retention flow

- Emotional pacing

- Information hierarchy



Not just:



- Effects

- Presets

- Templates





Damaging truth:



This kind of editing is slower.



It takes more thinking.



More rewatching.



More restraint.



BUT…



The end result is 10x more powerful…



And that’s what we care about.





What you’ll be responsible for:



Taking raw long-form footage and shaping it into a cohesive, compelling story



Making editing decisions based on the goal of the video… not habits



Enhancing clarity, flow, and retention without over-editing



Knowing when to add… and when to leave things alone





What we don’t care about:



- Fancy transitions

- Overused editing tricks

- How fast you can pump out clips





What we DO care about:



- Taste



- Judgment



- Restraint



- Storytelling ability



PS. You should be able to handle basic color grading inside DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut.



Nothing crazy…



But enough to make footage feel clean, consistent, and intentional.





How to apply (this is important):



Do NOT send us short-form edits.



We will ignore them.



Instead, send:



2–3 long-form projects (10+ minutes) you’ve edited



And tell us:



- What was the goal of the video?

- What editing decisions did you make to support that goal?

- What did you intentionally choose NOT to do… and why?





If you read this and thought:



“Finally… someone gets it.”



We want to see your work.





If you read this and thought:



“This seems like overthinking editing…”



This is not for you.





If this feels obvious to you…



You’re probably who we’re looking for.



Send your portfolio.

Study Start-Up Coordination

Site initiation visit preparation 



Regulatory readiness prior to the Site Initiation Visit 



Serve as primary regulatory contact with sponsors/CROs. 



Communication & Collaboration 



Work closely with Investigators, Study Coordinators, CROs and/or Sponsors to ensure regulatory timelines are met. 



Communicate IRB approvals, safety updates, and protocol changes to research team. 



Participate in research team meetings and provide regulatory updates. 



Document & Data Tracking 



Maintain accurate records of: 



IRB approvals 



Study safety reports 



Protocol versions and updates 



Essential documents for each study 



Assist in preparing site documentation for monitoring visits. 



Compliance & Oversight 



Ensure site compliance with ICH-GCP, federal regulations (FDA, OHRP), and institutional policies. 



Maintain and monitor investigator delegation logs and training documentation. 



Track and manage protocol deviations, safety reports, and other reportable events. 



Support audit preparation and respond to sponsor or regulatory agency requests.

title: Website Rebuild + SEO + Digital Marketing VA
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We are a landscaping and asphalt maintenance company company looking for an experienced Virtual Assistant to help us rebuild our WordPress website, optimize it for SEO, and manage our ongoing digital marketing. This is a long-term position with room to grow. 



 WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



1. WEBSITE REBUILD

• Rebuild our existing WordPress website

• Upgrade and rewrite website content to be professional, clear, and conversion-focused

• Ensure the site is mobile-friendly, fast-loading, and easy to navigate

• Set up contact forms and calls-to-action designed to generate leads

• Install and configure essential plugins (SEO, speed, security, forms)



2. SEO OPTIMIZATION

• Perform keyword research targeting our local service area

• Optimize all pages with proper titles, meta descriptions, headers, and image alt tags

• Set up or improve Google Search Console and Google Analytics

• Build out location-based service pages to improve local search rankings

• Perform ongoing monthly SEO maintenance and reporting



3. GOOGLE MY BUSINESS

• Audit and fully optimize our Google My Business profile

• Write keyword-rich business description and service listings

• Set up and manage regular GMB posts (weekly)

• Help us develop a strategy to get more customer reviews

• Monitor and respond to reviews as needed



4.
 MARKETING

• Optimize our
 Business Page

• Create and schedule regular posts (educational, promotional, before/after content)

• Develop a simple content calendar we can follow consistently

• Basic
 ad setup and management (if experienced)



5. LEAD FUNNEL

• Build a simple lead funnel — landing page, lead magnet or offer, and follow-up sequence

• Create a special offer or free estimate flow to capture visitor information



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• 2+ years experience with WordPress and Elementor

• Proven SEO experience with local/service businesses (please share examples)

• Experience with Google My Business optimization

• Familiar with
 Business Manager

• Strong written English — you will be writing and improving our content

• Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision

• Bonus: Experience in home services, landscaping, or contractor industries



TO APPLY, PLEASE INCLUDE:

• A link to 2–3 websites you have built or worked on

• A brief description of an SEO result you achieved for a client

• Your availability and hourly rate or monthly rate



HOURS & COMPENSATION

• Start: Part-time (20 hrs/week) with potential to go full-time

• Rate: Open to discussion based on experience

• Long-term position for the right candidate



We are easy to work with, communicate clearly, and want someone who takes ownership and pride in their work. If you are reliable, skilled, and want to grow with a small business — we want to hear from you!

title: Video Editor - Meta Ads
description:
We partner with medical practices and doctors to build dominant digital presences through strategic content and paid advertising. We capture high-quality video content in quarterly shoots and transform that raw footage into organic posts and high-converting video ads that position our clients as the leading authorities in their medical markets. We’re now expanding our team to meet growing demand. I’m looking for an absolute expert in video editing.



Role & Responsibilities

As our Video Editor, your main responsibilities will include:

- Reviewing and organizing hours of footage

- Adding B-roll, subtitles, and appropriate music to talking head videos

- Editing multiple short-form reels for Meta ads and organic content

- Creating eye-catching, scroll-stopping content

- Managing multiple projects while meeting deadlines

- Proficiency in CapCut Pro and Adobe Suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator)

- Working with a reliable internet connection and a computer capable of handling video editing software

- Comfortable communicating and collaborating through Asana and Slack





What We’re Looking For

You should have:

- Advanced English language skills

- An upbeat, helpful attitude

- 100% honesty and transparency

- Attention to detail (e.g., include your zodiac sign in the subject line!)

- Advanced knowledge of hooks and viral video techniques

- Advanced understanding of Meta ads

- Optional but valuable: Graphic design skills (thumbnails, social media graphics, motion graphics)

- If you cannot commit to daily output of 5–10 videos, please do not apply.



What We Value Most

- Good taste in design and content

- Timeliness and reliability

- Honesty and integrity

- Continuous desire to improve

- Asking questions and seeking clarification when needed

- Ability to follow step-by-step instructions

 A self-starter mindset and fearlessness in learning and helping



Work Schedule

- 5 videos edited per day

- Flexible hours; we care about quality and turnaround



Why Join Us?

You’ll be on the ground floor of helping our clients grow amazing businesses. Having had challenging bosses in the past, I’ve dedicated my career to creating a respectful, supportive, and growth-focused environment. You’ll be highly valued, and together, we’ll push each other to improve. We’re excited to work with someone who is as passionate about video editing and digital marketing as we are!



How to Apply

Please send the following when applying:

1. Your portfolio showcasing your video editing work, including reels, ads, and social media videos

2. Your resume, with references if possible

3. The completed Test Assignment (provided separately)

title: AI Automation Developer
description:
** We need someone detail oriented. Please make sure you fill out the form that is mentioned on this job description. 



About the Role

Phoenix Home Remodeling is a home remodeling company based in Phoenix, Arizona. We're building out our AI and automation capabilities and need a developer who can take ownership of that work and grow it over time.



This role starts focused on automations that directly support lead generation and conversions. Over time it will expand into other areas of our online operations including content publishing, image creation, social media, and more. You'll work directly with our internal team and will be the go-to person for building, maintaining, and improving our automation stack.



This is a ground-floor opportunity on a small, fast-moving team. If you like figuring things out independently, building things that didn't exist before, and seeing your work directly impact a real business, this is the right fit.





What You'll Be Working On

- Building and maintaining AI agent workflows using OpenClaw

- Creating and managing automation workflows in N8N

- Integrating tools with our CRM and marketing platform (GoHighLevel / GHL)

- Connecting LLM APIs (Claude, OpenAI, etc.) to real business tasks

- Automating content tasks

- Identifying new opportunities to reduce manual work across our team





Required Skills

- JavaScript / Node.js - solid working knowledge, not just basic familiarity

- N8N - must have built real workflows in N8N specifically, not just comparable tools

- LLM API experience - you've called Claude or OpenAI APIs directly and built something real with them

- Experience with AI agent frameworks - AutoGPT, CrewAI, LangChain, or anything similar

- API integrations - comfortable connecting platforms via REST APIs and webhooks

- Command line / CLI - comfortable working in terminal environments

- Strong written English - you'll communicate daily with a US-based team





Strongly Preferred

- Familiarity with OpenClaw - the tool is only a few months old so this isn't required, but if you've used it, say so

- Familiarity with hosting provider and setting up and connecting to protocols such as SSH, HTTPS, SFTP etc

- Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) - this is a meaningful advantage given how central it is to our stack

- Python - useful for scripting and many AI automation tasks

- SEO or digital marketing background - helps you understand the business context behind what you're building





What We're Looking For in a Person

- Self-directed. You don't wait to be told what to do next.

- Honest about what you don't know. This stack is new and evolving. We need someone who flags problems early, not three - weeks after something went wrong.

- Fast learner. OpenClaw is brand new technology. You'll need to figure things out from documentation and community resources.

- Reliable communicator. You're remote and international. Consistent updates and response time matter.





Logistics

- 100% remote

- Full-time, 50 hours/week

- Must have meaningful availability overlap with Arizona time (MST)

- Reliable internet connection and a dedicated workspace required



Compensation Structure: 

This role includes a 3-month trial period so both sides can make sure it's the right fit.



Month 1: $1,800/month

Month 2: $2,000/month

Month 3: $2,200/month

Month 4+ (full rate): $2,200-$2,400/month based on performance





To Apply

Complete our application form here: 
 



The form includes short screening questions. It takes 10-20 minutes to complete thoughtfully. Applications submitted without completing all questions will not be reviewed.

title: Content Producer & Brand VA — Real Estate Founder + Global Network (Part-Time, Long-Term Full-Time)
description:
The Realty Network (TRN) is a private, invite-only global network connecting real estate professionals across borders. We are in early growth — 10+ members, 10+ countries — and building two Instagram presences from the ground up:



1. My personal founder page — positioning me as a credible, trusted voice in international real estate (1 high-quality post per month, aesthetic and authority-focused)

2. The TRN brand page — active content to grow the network and attract agent members (minimum 2 Reels per week + 1–2 picture posts)



I need a content producer who can learn this brand deeply, think creatively about how to tell the story, and turn raw footage I record into polished, professional social content. This is a long-term role that grows as TRN grows.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Content production (primary focus):

— Edit short-form Reels from raw footage I record on my phone — clean cuts, on-screen captions, music selection, colour grading

— Design picture posts and carousel graphics in Canva that match both brand aesthetics

— Write captions in my voice from voice notes or bullet points I provide

— Build and manage a monthly content calendar for both pages

— Schedule posts via Meta Business Suite

— Track basic performance (reach, engagement) and flag what is working



Brand strategy support:

— Weekly 30-minute briefing call to develop content ideas based on what happened that week in the business

— Propose 5–7 content ideas per week — I pick 2–3 and you execute

— Repurpose one piece of content into multiple formats (e.g. Reel becomes a quote post, becomes a story)

— Help maintain a consistent aesthetic across both pages



Sales ops support (secondary):

— LinkedIn outreach using approved templates

— CRM tracking and follow-up sequences

— Member onboarding admin and scheduling



WHAT I AM LOOKING FOR

Must-haves:

— Strong short-form video editing portfolio — show me Reels you have edited, not just long-form

— Advanced Canva skills — not just templates. Ability to build and maintain a brand visual identity

— Excellent written English — you will be writing captions that sound like me

— Experience managing content for a personal brand or business Instagram account

— Proactive communicator — I want someone who comes to me with ideas, not someone who waits to be told what to do



Strong bonus:

— Experience with real estate, property, business, or professional services content

— Familiarity with LinkedIn outreach and CRM tools (Notion, Airtable)

— Understanding of what makes short-form content perform in a B2B or professional niche



HOURS AND RATE

— 20–25 hours per week to start

— Async-first, but must overlap with European time zones for at least 4 hours on weekdays

— Please include your hourly rate and your portfolio link in your application

— This role grows to full-time as TRN scales



HOW TO APPLY

I will only read applications that answer all three questions:



1. Share a link to 2–3 Reels you have edited. Tell me what your role was in creating them.

2. I am going to send you a 30-second voice note of me talking about a real estate topic. Can you write a caption in my voice from it? Reply yes or no — if yes, I will send it after reviewing your portfolio.

3. Describe a time you managed content for someone else's brand. What did you own and how did you keep the output consistent to their voice?



Applications without a portfolio and all three answers will not be reviewed.



Budget: $3–7/hr depending on experience

Hours: Part-time, 20–25 hrs/week

Duration: Long-term, ongoing

title: Growth Marketing Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a high-performance Growth Marketing Specialist to take ownership of our growth engine.

title: Full-Cycle Video Producer (Canva/CapCut/Premiere) – HVAC/Roofing FULL-TIME 9-5 EST
description:
We are seeking a highly detail-oriented Video Producer to manage end-to-end short-form video creation for HVAC clients.

This role goes beyond basic editing — we need someone who can research, script, source footage, and produce polished final videos with AI voiceovers and dynamic captions.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Creative Scripting: Draft engaging scripts based on a provided hook and call-to-action (CTA). Structure videos for high engagement and lead generation.

-Advanced Sourcing: Research client websites to find and scrape footage from their
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

-Asset Collection: Source HVAC equipment photos from our brand folders (Canva or Google Drive) or manufacturer websites.

-Local B-Roll Research: Find relevant city and service-area footage from Google or YouTube.

-Voiceover & Audio Production: Use ElevenLabs for all voiceovers. You must be experienced in voice grooming (phonetic spelling, aliases, or dashes) to ensure zero mispronunciations.

-Technical Accuracy: Ensure correct pronunciation of HVAC terms such as SEER, AFUE, BTUs and specific city or service area names.

-Dynamic Captions: Create word-for-word captions highlighted in Yellow and positioned in safe zones (mid-screen) so they are not covered by social media interface elements.



QUALITY & PAYMENT POLICY:

-Accuracy Standard: You are expected to deliver a high-quality first draft. Revisions required due to failure to follow instructions (incorrect phone number, wrong caption color, mispronounced terms, missing assets, etc.) must be corrected promptly.

-Billable Work: Additional payment will only be provided if the client changes the original scope or script after the first approved version.



REQUIREMENTS:

-Expert-level CapCut or Premiere Pro skills.

-Strong Canva experience.

-Pro-level familiarity with ElevenLabs including aliases, phonetic spelling, and pronunciation control.

-Strong English writing skills for technical HVAC scripting.

-Ability to deliver final video assets in three formats:

9:16 (Vertical)

1:1 (Square)

16:9 (Landscape)



HOW TO APPLY:

-Please start your proposal with "HVAC YELLOW" to verify you have read the full brief. 

-Provide 2–3 samples of your best short-form video work featuring dynamic captions and AI voiceovers.

-IF do not have portfolio showcasing work in our niche or prior experience creating HVAC/Plumbing or Roofing video ads, we’d like you to complete a short test project so we can properly evaluate your design skills, creativity, ability to follow directions, and understanding of ad structure.

-ASK: SEND ME TEST

- DO NOT submit your resume or any Figma or websites files as these are not considered as proof of your qualifications. SEND ONLY google drive or canva links to your previous work.

This role goes beyond basic editing. We need someone who can research, script, source footage, generate AI visuals, and produce polished marketing videos end-to-end.

You should be comfortable using AI tools to create realistic people, environments, and service scenarios related to HVAC, plumbing, and roofing.



Only applicants who provide complete answers to all 8 screening questions will be considered for this full-time role (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST).



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Creative Scripting: Draft engaging scripts based on a provided hook and call-to-action (CTA). Structure videos for high engagement and lead generation.

-Advanced Sourcing: Research client websites to find and scrape footage from their
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

-Asset Collection: Source HVAC equipment photos from our brand folders (Canva or Google Drive) or manufacturer websites.

-Local B-Roll Research: Find relevant city and service-area footage from Google or YouTube.

-Voiceover & Audio Production: Use ElevenLabs for all voiceovers. You must be experienced in voice grooming (phonetic spelling, aliases, or dashes) to ensure zero mispronunciations.

-Technical Accuracy: Ensure correct pronunciation of HVAC terms such as SEER, AFUE, BTUs and specific city or service area names.

-Dynamic Captions: Create word-for-word captions highlighted in Yellow and positioned in safe zones (mid-screen) so they are not covered by social media interface elements.



REQUIREMENTS:

-Ability to deliver final video assets in three formats:

9:16 (Vertical)

1:1 (Square)

16:9 (Landscape)



QUESTIONS:

title: Senior Mechanical Design Engineer I
description:
About the Role 



We are seeking a Senior Mechanical Design Engineer to lead mechanical design efforts across EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) projects. This role is responsible for developing high-quality, buildable designs and supporting projects from concept through construction. 

 

You will work closely with multidisciplinary teams to deliver efficient, compliant, and cost-effective mechanical systems for industrial and infrastructure projects. 



You will report under CorePoint Industries’ Engineering Manager.



What You’ll Do 

Lead mechanical design of equipment layouts, piping systems, and structural interfaces 

Develop, review, and approve 3D CAD models and 2D fabrication drawings 

Own engineering deliverables including BOMs, specifications, and datasheets 

Ensure designs meet ASME, ANSI, and project-specific standards 

Coordinate with process, structural, and electrical teams 

Review vendor drawings and ensure alignment with project requirements 

Interface with fabricators and vendors to ensure manufacturability 

Identify design risks and implement solutions 

Support procurement and construction teams with technical guidance 

Participate in design reviews and value engineering efforts 



What We’re Looking For 

Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering (or equivalent experience) 

5+ years of mechanical design experience in EPC or industrial environments 

Strong CAD proficiency (SolidWorks, AutoCAD, Inventor, or similar) 

Experience with piping layouts and industrial systems 

Knowledge of ASME, ANSI, and industry standards 

Experience producing fabrication drawings 

Ability to work in a hybrid environment 

Strong problem-solving and communication skills 



Nice to Have 

Experience with Plant 3D, CADWorx, or SmartPlant 

Industry experience (oil & gas, chemical, power, etc.) 

Mentorship experience 

FEA or engineering analysis experience 

Work Environment 



Hybrid (office and remote) 

Core business hours required 

Occasional travel may be required 



Compensation 

Competitive salary or hourly rate (based on experience) 

Full-time or contract options available 



How to Apply 

Please submit: 

- Resume 

- Portfolio or sample work 

- Brief description of relevant mechanical engineering experience

title: SEO Expert
description:
Role Overview:



We are seeking a skilled and data-driven SEO Expert with experience in the Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) industry to lead and execute our organic search strategy. This role is critical in strengthening our digital presence, increasing organic visibility, and driving high-quality traffic that converts.



The ideal candidate understands consumer behavior in the CPG space, stays ahead of SEO trends, and is passionate about delivering measurable results.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Develop and execute comprehensive SEO strategies tailored for CPG products and brands

2. Conduct in-depth keyword research aligned with consumer search intent and buying behavior

3. Optimize website content, product pages, and blogs for improved search rankings and conversions

4. Perform technical SEO audits and implement improvements (site speed, mobile optimization, indexing, crawlability)

5. Build and manage high-quality backlink strategies to improve domain authority

6. Monitor website performance using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, or SEMrush

7. Track keyword rankings, organic traffic, and ROI; provide regular reports with actionable insights

8. Stay updated on search engine algorithm changes and evolving SEO best practices

9. Collaborate with marketing, content, and e-commerce teams to align SEO with overall business goals



Qualifications



1. Proven experience as an SEO Specialist, preferably within the CPG (Consumer Packaged Goods) industry

2. Strong knowledge of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO

3. Proficiency in SEO tools (e.g., Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, Google Analytics, Search Console)

4. Understanding of e-commerce SEO and product optimization strategies

5. Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, and website structure is an advantage

6. Experience working with CMS platforms such as WordPress or Shopify

7. Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and translate insights into strategy

8. Excellent communication and reporting skills



Preferred Qualifications



1. Experience handling SEO for CPG brands or fast-moving consumer goods

2. Background in digital marketing, e-commerce, or content strategy

3. Familiarity with paid media (PPC) and integrated marketing campaigns



Note: Your cover letter must highlight your previous SEO experience specifically within the CPG (Consumer Packaged Goods) sector.

title: Brand Designer
description:
Wood & Co. is hiring a Brand Designer to lead the visual identity development for its ecommerce platform, internally referred to as Wood & Co. Atelier.



We are building a design-led sourcing environment for interior designers and architects—refined, structured, and material-focused. This role is responsible for translating an already-defined brand strategy and messaging foundation into a cohesive, usable visual identity system that can be applied across the Shopify experience and supporting brand touchpoints.



This is an iterative, hands-on engagement working closely with the founder and project lead, with an emphasis on clarity, precision, and practical applicability.'





Key Responsibilities

 - Translate existing brand positioning, essence, principles, and messaging into a clear visual identity direction and system

 - Create a brand book for internal use and rollout.

 - Develop a color palette with clear rules for application across digital and brand materials

 - Establish layout principles: grid, spacing, hierarchy, and structural rules

 - Define imagery and photography direction aligned with a refined, restrained, material-forward brand feel

 - Create application examples relevant to ecommerce (e.g., product pages, collections, article pages)

 - Participate in working sessions and collaborate on decisions that impact brand expression and implementation readiness

 - Maintain consistency, cleanliness, and clarity across the system and documentation





Qualifications

 - Strong experience developing brand identity systems for premium/luxury brands (or similarly restrained, design-led brands)

 - Demonstrated ability to translate verbal/strategic brand foundations into practical visual systems

 - Comfortable working in a structured, web-first context (ecommerce-aware identity thinking)



Experience with:

 - Brand identity systems: wordmarks/logos, typography, color, layout principles, and usage rules

 - Creating brand guidelines / brand books that are clear, organized, and usable by teams

 - Web-oriented layout and hierarchy systems (grid, spacing, component-aware thinking)

 - Art direction or photography direction for product/material-focused brands

 - Working with design-driven audiences (interior designers, architects, or adjacent fields)



You should be able to:

 - Work with pre-defined strategy and translate it into visual expression without reinventing the foundation

 - Maintain clean structure in both the visual system and the documentation

 - Apply visual guidelines with attention to spacing, hierarchy, and restraint

 - Communicate clearly and work collaboratively in iterative working sessions





Engagement Details

 - Project-based, we are looking for a defined set of deliverables

 - Open to engaging with branding studios

 - Open to discussing rates and will depend on the agreed set of deliverables, please include your rates and recommended scope in the application





Application Instructions

Please submit your application in a Google Drive folder (sent via link). Include the following:

 - Your CV

 - Your portfolio showcasing relevant work

 - A 1–2 minute intro video covering:

o Your background in brand identity work

o A project where developed a visual identity system

o How you approach creating practical brand guidelines for real implementation

o Why this project interests you

 - Recommended scope and deliverables (e.g. brand bible, visual identity system, layout direction, etc.)

 - Timeline and estimated cost/rate

title: AI + CAD Jewelry Image Designer (Luxury E-commerce Images)
description:
We are looking for someone who can create high-quality jewelry images using a combination of CAD files and AI tools.



You will be responsible for turning ring CAD designs into premium, luxury-style images similar to high-end jewelry brands.



---



**Important:**

You MUST use the CAD files as the base.



Do NOT rely only on AI-generated images.



We need consistency in:



* Ring proportions

* Lighting and shadows

* Angles and positioning

* Overall brand style



---



**Test Project (Paid):**

We will provide 3 ring CAD designs.



You will create:



* 1 main image combining all 3 rings into one composition (like a professional photoshoot)

* Optional: 1–2 additional images



---



**Main Requirement:**



* All 3 rings must be in ONE image

* Should look like a luxury jewelry brand photoshoot

* Clean, minimal, high-end aesthetic

* Balanced composition (not random placement)



---



**Style Direction:**



* Soft, realistic lighting

* Neutral or minimal background (stone, fabric, soft surface, etc.)

* Consistent reflections and shadows across all rings



---



**Goal:**

The final image should look like it came from a premium jewelry brand.



All rings must feel like they belong in the same collection.



---



**Requirements:**



* Experience with product rendering (Blender, KeyShot, or similar)

* Experience using AI tools for enhancement (not generation)

* Strong understanding of lighting, shadows, and composition



---



**To Apply (IMPORTANT):**



1. Send 3–5 product images you created

2. Include examples using CAD/rendering

3. Briefly explain your workflow



Applications without relevant examples will NOT be considered.



---



**Opportunity:**

If successful, you will handle all product and hero images for our website (long-term work).



---



**To confirm you read this, include the word “RENDERFLOW” at the top of your application.**

title: Content Growth Operator (Marketing Manager – Revenue & Systems Focused)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE :

We are not looking for a typical social media manager. We are looking for a high-level Content Growth Operator — someone who can turn content, data, and brand into measurable business growth. Your job is not to post content. 



Your job is to build and operate a system that drives: 

? leads 

? sales 

? retention 

? long-term revenue 



This role requires strong thinking, decision-making, and ownership. 



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR 

This role is for someone who: 

? thinks like a strategist, not just an executor 

? understands how content connects to revenue 

? can analyze data and make decisions independently 

? can lead direction without constant supervision 



WHO THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR 

Do not apply if: 

? you only know how to post or edit content 

? you rely heavily on trends without strategy 

? you need step-by-step instructions for everything 

? you cannot explain how content drives sales 



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES 

1. Content Strategy & Growth 

? Build and execute a content strategy aligned with revenue goals 

? Identify high-performing content pillars 

? Map content across the full customer journey 



2. Revenue-Focused Marketing 

? Track leads, conversions, and revenue from content 

? Focus on attracting qualified buyers, not just views 

? Align content with offers and sales funnels 



3. Performance Tracking & Optimization 

? Build and manage a weekly performance dashboard 

? Identify what is working, what is not, and why 

? Make data-driven decisions and adjustments 



4. Content Direction (Not Just Execution) 

? Lead ideation and content planning 

? Provide clear direction to editors or creators 

? Extract ideas from the CEO and turn them into scalable content 



5. Systems & Workflow 

? Build SOPs and repeatable systems for content production 

? Create efficient workflows for ideation, posting, and repurposing 



6. Testing & Scaling 

? Run tests on hooks, formats, topics, and CTAs 

? Scale what works and eliminate what does not 



7. Multi-Platform Strategy 

? Understand how different platforms work (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
) 

? Adapt content per platform instead of reposting blindly 



REQUIRED SKILLS 

? Strong understanding of content strategy and marketing 

? Ability to connect content to business outcomes and revenue 

? Experience with analytics and performance tracking 

? Strong decision-making and problem-solving skills 

? Ability to think in systems and build processes 

? Strong communication and leadership ability 



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE 

? Increased qualified leads from content 

? Improved conversion from content to sales 

? Clear weekly insights and action plans 

? A structured content system that runs efficiently 



COMPENSATION 

? Based on experience 

? Performance-based incentives available for strong candidates 



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (IMPORTANT) 



To apply, follow these steps exactly: 

1. Send your resume and portfolio.  

2. Send a Loom video (2–5 minutes) answering: 

? How do you turn content into revenue for a service-based business? 

? What metrics matter most to you and why? 

3. Include links to: 

? Brands or accounts you have worked on 

? Specific results you helped achieve 

4. Answer this question in your application: 

? If nothing in our content is performing after 60 days, what would you do? 



Applications without these will not be reviewed. 



FINAL NOTE 

We are not hiring someone to “manage content.” 

We are hiring someone who can build a system that drives real business growth. 

If you are someone who thinks strategically, takes ownership, and focuses on results — we 

would love to hear from you.

title: Technical Operation Specialist - clay.com, n8n, lead generation
description:
Technical Operations Specialist — The Kiln (A 2X Company)

About The Kiln

The Kiln is a GTM engineering agency built by a team of automation experts, data scientists, and early Clay employees. We design custom, AI-powered inbound, outbound, marketing, and RevOps systems for the world's leading growth teams. Our clients include companies like Windsurf, Browserbase, Sendoso, Loxo, and many more. We turn messy data into high-intent pipeline and help teams sell smarter, not harder. Recently acquired by 2X, we're scaling fast and looking for sharp, technical people to grow with us.

The Role

As a Technical Operations Specialist, you will sit at the intersection of data, automation, and marketing operations. This is not a passive analytics role — you will be building, maintaining, and optimizing the automated systems that power our clients' go-to-market motions. You'll work directly with our GTM engineers and client teams to ensure data flows cleanly, automations run reliably, and insights are actionable. If you're someone who gets excited about connecting systems, cleaning messy datasets, and watching a well-built workflow fire off perfectly — this role is for you.

What You'll Do



Build, monitor, and optimize marketing automation workflows using tools like n8n, Clay, and similar platforms to support client campaigns and internal operations.

Analyze and transform raw data into structured, enriched datasets that feed directly into outbound and inbound sales systems.

Collaborate with GTM engineers to design and implement data pipelines, lead scoring models, and enrichment workflows inside Clay tables.

Troubleshoot and debug automation failures, API integrations, and data sync issues across multiple platforms (CRMs,
 tools, enrichment providers).

Create and maintain dashboards and reports that give clients and internal teams visibility into campaign performance, pipeline health, and automation output.

Document standard operating procedures (SOPs) for recurring workflows so that processes are repeatable, scalable, and easy to hand off.

Stay current on new tools, integrations, and best practices in the GTM engineering and marketing automation space, and proactively recommend improvements.



What We're Looking For

Previous experience as a Data Analyst, Marketing Operations Analyst, Business Intelligence Analyst, or a similar data-centric role is required. You should have hands-on experience with at least one marketing automation or workflow automation platform such as n8n, Clay, Zapier, Make (Integromat), or similar tools. Strong proficiency in data analysis is essential — you should be comfortable working with spreadsheets, SQL, or BI tools to extract, clean, and interpret data. Familiarity with CRM platforms like HubSpot or Salesforce, and a solid understanding of APIs, webhooks, and how automated systems communicate with each other, are important. When applying for this position, please use the subject line TechOps-Kiln-2026 | [Your Full Name] so we can properly route your application. Excellent attention to detail is a must — you catch the data discrepancy before it becomes a client problem.

Nice to Have



Experience with Clay specifically — building tables, enrichment workflows, and outbound data pipelines.

Familiarity with outbound sales tooling (Instantly, Smartlead, Lemlist, or similar sequencing platforms).

Basic scripting or coding ability (Python, JavaScript, or Google Apps Script) for custom integrations or data transformations.

Experience in a B2B SaaS, agency, or fast-paced startup environment.

Exposure to data enrichment tools like LeadMagic, Apollo, ZoomInfo, or Clearbit.



Why Join The Kiln



Work at the cutting edge of GTM engineering alongside some of the most experienced Clay operators and automation builders in the industry.

Be part of a lean, high-impact team where your contributions are visible, valued, and directly tied to client outcomes.

Access to best-in-class tools and a culture that encourages experimentation, continuous learning, and creative problem-solving.

Grow your career in one of the fastest-evolving spaces in B2B — GTM automation and AI-powered sales infrastructure.

Backed by 2X, giving you the stability of a larger organization with the speed and energy of an agency.



How to Apply

Send your resume and a brief cover letter to 
 with CC to 
 us about a workflow or automation you've built that you're proud of — what problem it solved, what tools you used, and what the outcome was. We value builders, so show us what you've done.

title: AI Automation & Agent Systems Engineer (n8n / LLM / AI Workflows)
description:
---



**Location:** Remote

**Type:** Full-Time



---



## About Us



We are a fast-growing B2B lead generation company building a heavily automated, AI-driven backend across outreach, fulfilment, reporting, and operations.



We already use automation extensively. Now we’re scaling fast—and we need someone who can **build, optimise, and expand our automation systems using AI.**



---



## The Role



We are hiring an **AI Automation Engineer** to join the team full-time.



Your core job is simple:



**Build automations. Improve systems. Implement AI. Repeat.**



You’ll be responsible for continuously developing new workflows, improving existing ones, and integrating the latest AI tools into our operations.



This is not a one-off project—this is an ongoing role for someone who wants to grow with a high-performance team.



---



## What You’ll Be Doing



* Building automation workflows across the business

* Creating multi-step systems using AI + automation tools

* Continuously improving and optimising existing workflows

* Implementing new AI tools, models, and systems as they emerge

* Connecting different platforms, APIs, and data sources

* Supporting internal operations, outreach, reporting, and fulfilment through automation



---



## Core Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



You must have **real, hands-on experience** with:



* n8n

* Zapier / Make (Integromat)

* Building end-to-end automation workflows

* Working with APIs, webhooks, and integrations

* Using AI tools (OpenAI, Claude, etc.) inside workflows



If you have **not built real automation systems using these tools—do not apply.**



---



## Nice to Have (Bonus)



* Experience with GoHighLevel or other CRM systems

* Experience building AI agents or advanced AI workflows

* Strong understanding of business operations and how automation fits into them



---



## What We’re Looking For



* Someone who **actually builds**, not just talks

* Someone who can **figure things out independently**

* Someone who stays up to date with **new AI tools and applies them fast**

* Someone who wants to **grow with the company long-term**



---



## How to Apply (Important)



Send your application to:







Include:



1. **A Loom video (mandatory)**



   * Introduce yourself

   * Share your screen

   * Walk through automations you’ve built

   * Explain how they work



2. Examples of workflows you’ve created



3. Tools you’ve used



**If you cannot show real automations you’ve built—do not apply.**



---

title: Work Order Assistant (Remote, Part-Time)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented assistant to help manage commercial service work orders.

This role focuses on keeping jobs moving. You will check existing vendors first, source when needed, contact vendors directly, coordinate scheduling, and follow up to ensure nothing sits idle.



The work itself is straightforward, but requires strong attention to detail, consistency, and the ability to follow instructions exactly.



Responsibilities:

-Check existing vendor list before sourcing new vendors

-Source local vendors when needed based on job type and location

-Contact vendors by phone and text using provided scripts

-Confirm availability and basic job fit

-Coordinate scheduling within required timelines

-Follow up consistently until jobs are moving forward

-Keep all work orders organized and up to date

-Escalate anything unclear instead of guessing



How you should work:

-You follow instructions exactly without skipping steps

-You are consistent and don’t let tasks sit unfinished

-You are comfortable doing repeat tasks the same way every time

-You pay attention to details and don’t miss small things

-You are comfortable making phone calls daily

-You prioritize the closest and most relevant vendors

-You prefer clear systems over guessing



This role is NOT a good fit if:

-You like to figure things out your own way

-You skip steps or improvise

-You overlook small details

-You avoid making phone calls

-You prefer flexible or creative work



Tools and workflow:

This role uses structured systems and tools including ChatGPT to assist with vendor sourcing, communication, and scheduling.



You should be comfortable using tools to support your work while still following instructions exactly and keeping outputs clean and structured.



Hours and pay:

Part-time, 2 to 4 hours per day & 10 to 20 hours per week starting.

Remote

4 to 6 dollars per hour



Application instructions:

Start your application with READY

Keep your response short and structured

Do not include unnecessary explanations



Test task:

Location Portland OR

Scope Interior electrical issue, lights not working in a commercial space

Find 2 to 3 electricians as close to the job site as possible. They must have recent reviews and clearly specialize in electrical work.

Name

Company

Phone

Distance

Why they are a good fit



Final question:

In one sentence, explain how you would use ChatGPT to help with this role.

title: Cold Caller for NY Web Design Agency (Pre-Vetted Leads / High Bonus)
description:
About Us



We're a web design agency based in New York that builds websites exclusively for contractors — HVAC, plumbers, electricians, roofers, and similar trades. Business is growing and we need a reliable phone rep to help us reach more contractors across the US.



What This Job Is



You'll be calling contractors from a list we provide, asking them 2–3 simple questions, and getting their permission to receive a short video preview of what their website could look like. That's the whole job.

You are NOT selling anything on the call. You are NOT explaining pricing. You are NOT closing deals. The owner handles all of that. Your only goal is to get the contractor to say "yes, send me the video" and collect their
.



Your Daily Tasks



Make outbound calls through GoHighLevel (GHL) — our CRM and calling platform

Call contractors from our pre-built list inside GHL

Follow a short script we provide and train you on

Ask whether they have a website and get their
 if interested

Disposition every call correctly in GHL after hanging up

Send a brief end-of-day summary of your results





Requirements



Clear, confident spoken English — this is the single most important requirement for this role

Experience with cold calling or phone outreach preferred

Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) is a plus — if you have it, mention it

Quiet workspace and reliable internet connection

Available to work 9am–1pm US Eastern Time, Monday–Friday. This is a night shift role for Philippines-based applicants — please only apply if this schedule works for you.

Comfortable making 80–150 calls per day

Self-managed and honest about your daily numbers





Compensation



$4–$6 per hour depending on experience

$5 bonus every time a contractor views the video we send

$50 bonus every time a contractor signs up as a client

Bonuses paid weekly with your base pay





How to Apply



1. Go to Vocaroo.com

2. Record a 30–60 second voice memo introducing yourself and describing any phone or sales experience you have

3. Copy the Vocaroo link

4. Send it in your message when you apply



Start your message with the words "New York Caller" so I know you read the full listing. Applications without a Vocaroo link or without those words will not be reviewed.



What We're Looking For Beyond the Basics



Honesty over hype — if you had a slow day, just tell us. We'd rather know than not know

Consistency — 100 solid calls a day beats 200 rushed ones

Coachability — we give feedback regularly and expect it to be applied

A long-term mindset — if this works for both of us, there's room to grow





We're easy to work with, we pay on time, and we give you everything you need to succeed. If you're a strong communicator who can follow a script and stay consistent, this is a good fit. Also, the owner is Filipino-American (mabuhay!).

Looking forward to hearing your voice.
