title: GoHighLevel Specialist (Part-Time | 10 hrs/week)
description:
Job Title: GoHighLevel Specialist (Part-Time | 10 hrs/week)

About the Role

I'm a Pitch Performance Coach and business strategist who runs a growing coaching and consulting brand. I need a self-directed GoHighLevel expert who can receive a brief, ask the right clarifying questions upfront, and execute — without needing to be walked through every step.

This is a part-time, ongoing role — approximately 10 hours per week to start — with the potential to increase as the business scales and you prove your work.

What You'll Be Doing



Building and managing online courses inside GoHighLevel (memberships, modules, lesson structure, drip content)

Setting up automations and workflows 
 sequences, triggers, pipelines, tags, and conditional logic)

Designing and publishing landing pages and sales funnels that look professional and convert

Ongoing landing page maintenance and optimization — keeping existing pages clean, functional, and performing

Maintaining and updating websites built inside GHL

Troubleshooting and QA-ing existing funnels, forms, and automations



Requirements



Minimum 2 years of hands-on GoHighLevel experience — you must know the platform deeply, not just the basics

Proven ability to build courses and membership areas inside GHL

Strong skills in automation/workflow logic — you understand how triggers, conditions, and actions connect and can build them without a tutorial

Experience building landing pages and websites inside GHL that look polished and professional

You work independently. I provide the vision and direction — you figure out the execution. If you need step-by-step instructions for standard GHL tasks, this role is not for you

Strong communicator who proactively flags issues, asks smart questions before starting — not after — and delivers on deadlines without reminders

Reliable internet connection and consistent availability



Bonus Points If You Have



Experience running or supporting
/Meta ad campaigns

Experience with
 deliverability, custom domains, and DNS setup inside GHL

An eye for clean, professional design



Compensation & Hours



$6–$7/hour USD depending on experience

Approximately 10 hours per week to start — hours may increase based on performance and business needs

Part-time, contract role — not full-time



To Apply

At least one example or screenshot of a GHL course, funnel, or automation you've created

Your available hours and time zone

title: Patient Concierge — Remote / Full-Time
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

LeadJuice is hiring a Patient Concierge to convert inbound leads into booked appointments for our partner medical clinics. You will be contacting real people seeking treatment for pain — your job is to understand their situation, qualify them, and get them scheduled. This is a high-output calling role with a clear benchmark: schedule at least 50% of your daily leads. 



SCHEDULE

Full-time | Monday – Friday | 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM ET | 9 hours/day | 100% Remote



WHAT YOU'LL DO: 

Work an assigned lead list each day:  calling, texting following up, and converting leads into scheduled appointments.



Log every interaction, status update, and disqualification reason in the CRM in real time.



Join weekly meetings  with the team and Scheduling Manager to review numbers and trajectory for improvement.



Treat every lead as a real person seeking care — not just a number in a pipeline.



Track your own schedule rate throughout the day and adjust your approach to hit the 50?nchmark



Flag patterns early — unusual disqualification rates, low-converting lead sources, or geography/niche issues



PERFORMANCE STANDARDS

Green: 50%+ of leads scheduled per day — performing at benchmark

Yellow: 40–50% — coaching triggered; performance improvement plan if sustained two weeks

Red: Below 40% — performance improvement plan initiated if sustained one week





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



*warning: we are looking for someone with impeccable verbal english. We will pay MORE for someone who is. If you do not have this - do not apply. 



Strong verbal communication in English — you'll be speaking with patients in the US

Experience in outbound calling, appointment setting, or a similar phone-based role

Comfortable with CRM tools and disciplined about real-time data entry

Self-directed — you know where you stand against your numbers without being told

Empathetic, patient, and professional when speaking with people seeking medical care

Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional home work environment





NICE TO HAVE

Background in healthcare scheduling, medical front desk, or patient services

Experience working with US-based healthcare or wellness clients





TO APPLY, PLEASE Follow the google link below:

title: SEO Marketing Specialist
description:
Full job description



Our Marketing Department is looking for a skilled SEO Marketing Specialist to join our growing team at Lumaprints. This is a long-term remote position open to candidates based in the Philippines who are interested in building a stable and growth-oriented career with our company.



In this role, you will take ownership of both on-site SEO performance and off-site authority building. You will be responsible for maintaining and optimizing our website, improving search rankings, and ensuring all content across our platform is accurate, well-written, and aligned with SEO best practices.



You will work directly on our WordPress website editing pages, optimizing HTML elements, and continuously improving product pages to maximize visibility and conversions. At the same time, you will drive external SEO growth by securing backlinks, publishing articles, and increasing Lumaprints’ presence across third-party platforms, media, and high-authority websites.



In addition, you will play a key role in ensuring Lumaprints remains visible in AI-driven search environments, including generative search engines and AI-powered discovery tools. This includes optimizing content for structured data, semantic relevance, and discoverability across emerging AI platforms.



The ideal candidate has a strong SEO background, is comfortable working with HTML and WordPress, and understands that modern SEO goes beyond traditional rankings, it requires building authority, visibility, and presence across both search engines and AI ecosystems.



Essential Duties and Responsibilities:

 - Optimize website content and structure to improve search engine rankings

 - Review, rewrite, and enhance all product pages to ensure high-quality, SEO-friendly content

 - Edit and maintain website pages using WordPress and HTML

 - Conduct keyword research and implement effective on-page SEO strategies

 - Ensure proper use of meta tags, headers, schema, internal linking, and other SEO elements

 - Perform regular site audits and resolve technical SEO issues

 - Monitor website performance and identify opportunities for improvement

 - Maintain consistency in content quality, tone, and formatting across all pages

 - Collaborate with the marketing team to align SEO efforts with campaigns and product launches

 - Stay updated on the latest SEO trends, algorithm updates, and best practices



External-Facing Growth Responsibilities:

 - Develop and execute strategies to expand Lumaprints’ presence across external platforms

 - Secure high-quality backlinks through outreach, partnerships, and guest posting

 - Identify and connect with relevant websites, blogs, and publications for feature opportunities

 - Pitch and publish articles, brand mentions, and features in industry-related media

 - Build relationships with content creators, publishers, and website owners

 - Drive outbound SEO initiatives to increase domain authority and search visibility

 - Ensure consistent brand representation across all third-party platforms



AI Optimization Responsibilities:

 - Optimize website content for AI-driven search engines and generative search platforms

 - Structure content to improve visibility in AI-generated answers and summaries

 - Implement schema markup and structured data to enhance machine readability

 - Adapt content for semantic search and intent-based discovery

 - Monitor performance in AI search environments and identify growth opportunities

 - Stay updated on trends in AI SEO, generative AI visibility, and search evolution

 - Collaborate with the team to align SEO strategies with emerging AI technologies



Requirements:

* Proven experience in Search Engine Optimization (SEO)

* Strong understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO

* Experience working with WordPress (content management, plugins, and page editing)

* Ability to read and edit HTML

* Strong writing and editing skills with excellent attention to detail

* Experience optimizing e-commerce or product pages

* Knowledge of backlink strategies and external SEO growth

* Familiarity with AI-driven search or content optimization

* Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret performance data

* Ability to work independently in a remote setup

* Strong commitment to long-term growth with the company



Preferred Qualifications:

 / Experience with SEO tools (e.g., Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Search Console, Google Analytics)

 / Basic knowledge of technical SEO (site speed, indexing, crawlability)

 / Familiarity with content strategy and keyword planning

 / Experience working with US-based or international companies

 / Experience optimizing content for AI search tools and generative platforms



Work Setup: Remote (Philippines-based candidates only)

Compensation: $6.00 – $7.50/hour (rate may be negotiated based on experience and skill level)

Schedule: Monday to Friday Pacific Standard Time (exact schedule to be discussed during hiring process)





** To apply for this role, kindly share your CV in a Google Drive/Dropbox link format via direct message.**

title: Video Editor (Real Estate & Social Media Content)
description:
We’re looking for an experienced and highly creative Video Editor to join our team, producing high-quality content across real estate, social media, and digital advertising.

This role is ideal for someone who understands not just how to edit—but how to create content that captures attention, tells a story, and drives action.



About the Role

You’ll be responsible for editing a wide range of video content, including:

- Property listing videos (cinematic + fast-paced walkthroughs)

- Social media content (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

- Paid social media ads (Meta-focused, performance-driven creatives)

- Vlog-style and behind-the-scenes content

You’ll work closely with our marketing team to bring ideas to life and ensure all content aligns with brand, strategy, and performance goals.



Key Responsibilities

- Edit engaging, high-quality video content across multiple formats and platforms

- Structure videos with strong hooks, pacing, and storytelling to maximise retention

- Optimise content for performance (especially for paid ads and short-form platforms)

- Add motion graphics, text overlays, music, and sound design where required

- Colour grade and ensure consistent visual quality across all content

- Turn around edits efficiently while maintaining a high standard

- Collaborate with the team on creative direction, concepts, and improvements



Requirements

- Proven experience editing property, social media, and ad content

- Strong understanding of short-form content and attention-grabbing hooks (first 3 seconds)

- Ability to adapt editing style depending on the goal (branding vs conversion)

- Proficiency in editing software (e.g. Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro)

- Strong sense of pacing, music selection, and storytelling

- Experience with captions, subtitles, and social-first formatting (9:16, 1:1, 16:9)

- Ability to take feedback and iterate quickly



Bonus (Highly Valued)

- Experience working with real estate brands or agencies

- Understanding of Meta Ads creative strategy

- Basic motion graphics or animation skills

What We’re Looking For

- Someone who takes ownership and pride in their work

- Fast, reliable, and able to meet deadlines

- Creative thinker who brings ideas—not just execution



To Apply

A portfolio or examples of relevant work (property videos, ads, social content)

A brief introduction about your experience

Your availability and turnaround times

title: AI UGC Video Creator (Veo / Kling / Runway) – Health & Wellness Brand
description:
We're building a health & wellness content brand that's 100% powered by AI-generated UGC-style videos — talking-head content, B-roll, product showcases — all made with AI, no real creators on camera.

If you already know what it means to generate a realistic AI person, animate them with natural lip-sync, hand gestures, and real emotion using tools like Veo, Kling, Runway, Pika, or HeyGen — keep reading. This role is for you.

You'll work directly with the founder producing short-form vertical videos (TikTok, Reels,
) in the health/wellness/natural remedies niche. Think: scroll-stopping hooks, expressive AI characters, and cinematic B-roll — all generated, not filmed.

This is a long-term, ongoing role with consistent work for the right person.



What You'll Be Doing:



Generating realistic AI talking-head UGC videos from scripts (lip-sync, gestures, facial expressions)

Creating AI B-roll sequences that match specific moods, styles, and visual direction

Building and maintaining consistent AI characters/personas across multiple videos

Writing and refining prompts to get the highest quality output from AI video tools

Working smart with credits — maximizing quality while being efficient with generations

Keeping up with the latest AI video tools, updates, and techniques





You're a Perfect Fit If:



You've already made AI UGC-style videos — not just played with the tools, but actually produced content

You know the difference between a stiff AI generation and one that actually looks natural and alive

You've used Veo (Google Flow), Kling, Runway, Pika, HeyGen, D-ID, or similar tools

You understand short-form content — hooks, pacing, energy, what makes people stop scrolling

You're obsessed with detail — bad lip-sync, weird hands, uncanny valley stuff bothers you

You can work independently, take creative direction, and deliver without hand-holding

Bonus: you've created AI content in the health, wellness, or beauty niche





Job Details:



Type: Part-time to start ? full-time for the right person

Schedule: Flexible hours — output matters, not when you work

Compensation: Competitive, based on experience — discussed with qualified candidates

Location: Remote (Philippines-based preferred)





How to Apply:

I want to see your work, not just your words.



Short intro — who you are, your experience with AI video tools

Show me 1–3 AI-generated UGC videos you've made — Google Drive links, portfolio links, or even screen recordings of your Veo/Kling outputs. This is the most important part.

Tell me which AI video tools you use and which one you get the best results with

Bonus: Drop a link to any social media page or channel where you've posted AI-generated content





Applications without examples of AI video work will not be reviewed. I need to see what you can do — even rough outputs are fine, I just need proof you've actually done this before.



Looking forward to seeing your work

We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: AI EDITOR VIDEO SPECIALIST
description:
We run two DTC e-commerce brands selling semi-permanent tattoos in the US and EU. We need a video editor who uses AI tools daily — not someone who "knows about AI," someone who lives in it.

You will produce daily short-form videos (TikTok, Reels, Meta Ads) for both brands. You'll generate scenes, transitions, and product visuals using AI tools (Runway, Kling, Seedance, Pika, Midjourney, and whatever dropped this morning). You'll build complete prompt-to-publish workflows with minimal manual footage.

Non-negotiable: you use AI video generation tools every single day. You have strong editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or DaVinci). You have a portfolio showing AI-generated or AI-enhanced video work. You understand what makes people stop scrolling and buy.

To apply: send your portfolio + a 2-min Loom showing one AI video workflow you actually use. No Loom, no review.

title: J-1 Visa Program Coordinator
description:
Talent Connect Inc is a U.S. Department of State–designated J-1 Visa sponsor organization specializing in internship and trainee programs. The Program Coordinator will be responsible for managing accounts, maintaining client relationships, providing exceptional customer service, and analyzing and editing program documents, maintain communicating with program participants and U.S. employers.



Please note that all candidates must meet the following prerequisites: reliable high-speed internet connection, dual monitor setup, excellent typing skills, strong communication abilities and record a 1–2 minute video introduction via Loom (
)



A high level of integrity is essential to succeed in this role and to grow within the company. Please apply only if you are seeking a long-term opportunity and can commit consistently; this is not intended as a short-term gig.



Duties and responsibilities:

Learn about the J-1 Visa intern/trainee programs, steps of the application process and required documents. (Training materials will be provided)

Communicate on daily basis with employers and participants, to assist with
ing the required forms and help with completing the information/documents required.

Ability to explain programs and application processes clearly and concisely to clients.

Use CRM to update information related to employers.

Creating work schedule and project plans to meet deadlines.

Addressing client/questions

Work independently under general direction related to goals.

Work on U.S. time zone



Detailed job description and bonus structure will be provided to selected participants.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

description:
We are an AI marketing agency creating short-form content for Instagram and
.



We are looking for an AI Video Creator who can take pre-written scripts and turn them into high-quality AI-generated videos using advanced tools.



This is a visual production role



???? What You’ll Do

Turn provided scripts into fully visual AI videos

Generate:

Background scenes

Visual elements that match the script

Fixed pay

Please note hours fluctuate, this role is focused on hitting the desired number of videos with quality, not the hours

title: Full Time Remote Customer Support Assistant
description:
We are building a distributed support team and are looking for a Customer Support Assistant who takes written communication seriously and values consistency in their work. This is a full-time remote position designed for someone who wants dependable income, clear expectations, and the chance to grow within a structured environment over time.



This role is not project-based or temporary. We are looking for someone who wants stability, is comfortable working set hours, and understands that strong support is built on reliability and attention to detail.



You will spend your workday handling customer conversations through written messages. Your responsibility is to provide clear, accurate, and professional responses while maintaining a friendly tone. You will work within defined guidelines, manage several conversations at the same time, and ensure users receive timely and helpful replies. Part of the role also involves flagging recurring issues, technical problems, or useful feedback so the team can improve processes and systems.

Full onboarding and training are provided before you begin working independently.



This role requires strong written English and a typing speed of at least 60 words per minute. You must have a reliable internet connection of 50-100 Mbps or higher. A dependable laptop or desktop computer with at least 8 GB of RAM is required.



You should be available full-time for a consistent schedule of eight hours per day, six days per week. We value people who are detail-oriented, professional in their communication, dependable in meeting expectations, and open to feedback and improvement.



Previous experience in customer support, chat-based roles, or remote work is helpful but not required.



The hourly pay for this position ranges from 4 to 6 USD, depending on experience and performance.

In addition to base pay, there are performance-based bonuses, regular reviews, and opportunities for raises. Team members who consistently perform well can grow into higher-responsibility and higher-paying roles over time.



Why Join Us?

You’ll be working remotely in a structured environment with clear systems, training, and expectations. This role is ideal for someone who wants long-term stability rather than short-term gigs, and who values growth through consistent performance.



Apply now by sending us a message with all relevant information mentioned above and we look forward to having you!

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Job description:



If you are seeking an SDR role that:



Offers you to go beyond simply setting up robotic
 sequences

Allows you to bring ideas and be part of the team that is solving prospecting challenges

Offers opportunities to make a significant impact on the growth of companies across different industries

Provides challenging yet rewarding experiences

Provides exposure to diverse countries/cultures

Offers you to work with a collaborative, supportive and caring team

Then look no further, you will love working with us!



About EXPAND IN ASIA



Expand In Asia specialises in helping B2B companies grow their sales pipeline. We do that by offering state of the art B2B outbound prospecting services. We focus on the early stages of a sales cycle to significantly expand our clients’ top of the funnel. We believe that expanding our clients’ business requires in-depth knowledge about their business and their prospects. Our clients outsource to us their SDR (Sales Development Representative) activities. The aim is to function as an extension of our clients.



We operate under the following values: Passion to create value for our customers, Resilience to achieve results and Lead with compassion in everything that we do.



What you will do



Day-to-day responsibilities include prospecting, qualifying leads, setting appointments with qualified prospects.

Craft, execute and improve a variety of outbound sales prospecting campaigns using cold calling, LinkedIn and
.

Demonstrate capacity to navigate complex organisational structures to connect with the appropriate decision-makers.

Develop and execute outbound prospecting campaigns through innovative approaches.

Help define the go-to-market strategy and territory planning customised to different countries.

Work with contact research teams to build the pipeline of contacts to engage.

Monitor and optimise campaign performance against key metrics

Deliver persuasive post-campaign presentations to clients

What you bring



4-5 years of proven B2B SDR Experience,

B2B outbound
 and LinkedIn campaign management, market research analysis.

Has a strong cold calling background, with experience reaching out to prospects, and booking meetings.

Communication Skills: Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to engage and influence stakeholders at all levels.

Learning abilities: Quickly adaptable to new processes and digital tools with the will to improve processes

Personal attributes: Entrepreneurial, strategic, empathic, resilient, digitally savvy, and a results-driven self-starter.

Work From home Set- up: Reliable internet, connection, back up for power interruptions, Recent computer specs and a conducive work environment free from any disturbances

Prospecting (SDR) to Enterprise businesses is needed

Job Type: Full-time



Benefits:





Work from home

Application Question(s):





Please share your LinkedIn profile

Which of the following have you personally handled? (Select all that apply)

Cold calling and booking meetings





Managing outbound
 campaigns





LinkedIn prospecting and outreach





Market research and lead qualification





Campaign performance tracking and reporting





Do you have a reliable work-from-home setup (stable internet, backup power, updated computer, and distraction-free workspace)?

Experience:





SDR: 4 years (Required)

Work Location: Remote

title: Business Development Manager (SDR Manager) – Enterprise Focus (WFH)
description:
We are not looking for an average SDR Manager.

We are looking for someone who can build, lead, and scale a high-performing outbound team targeting enterprise clients.

If you’ve successfully led SDR teams, understand how to break into complex organizations, and know how to consistently generate high-quality pipeline from enterprise accounts — this role is for you.

________________________________________

What You’ll Own

• Lead and scale a team of SDRs focused on enterprise prospecting and pipeline generation 

• Build and optimize outbound strategies across cold calling, LinkedIn, and
 

• Drive consistent generation of qualified meetings with enterprise decision-makers (VP to C-level) 

• Coach SDRs on navigating multi-threaded enterprise sales cycles 

• Improve conversion rates across the funnel (contact ? conversation ? meeting ? pipeline) 

• Develop messaging that resonates with enterprise pain points and buying triggers 

• Own SDR KPIs: pipeline generated, meeting quality, conversion rates, and activity performance 

• Analyze performance data and continuously optimize team output 

• Build a repeatable and scalable outbound playbook 

• Managing and communicating with clients (presenting result, defining and revisiting/readjusting prospecting strategy)

________________________________________

What Makes You a Strong Fit

• 5–8+ years in B2B outbound sales, with 2–3+ years leading SDR/BDR teams 

• Proven success in generating pipeline from enterprise accounts 

• Strong experience in cold calling, LinkedIn outreach, and outbound
 campaigns 

• Ability to engage senior stakeholders (Directors, VPs, C-suite) 

• Experience navigating complex organizations and long sales cycles 

• Data-driven — you understand metrics and know how to improve them 

• Strong coaching ability — you can turn average SDRs into top performers 

• Highly strategic, execution-focused, and results-driven 

________________________________________

What We Value

• Ownership mindset — you take responsibility for results 

• Speed and adaptability — you move and improve fast

• High standards — you don’t settle for average performance 

• Resilience — you do not easily give up and always look for ways to make things work

________________________________________

Work Setup (Remote)

• Stable high-speed internet 

• Backup for power and connectivity 

• Updated laptop/desktop 

• Distraction-free workspace 

________________________________________

Why Join Us

• Opportunity to build and shape a high-impact SDR team 

• Work directly with leadership and influence revenue growth 

• Fully remote environment with a performance-driven culture 

• High visibility role with strong career growth potential

title: Senior Customer Service Rep - Remote Role
description:
At Red Water Holdings, we craft high-quality supplements and cosmetics that help people look, feel, and perform better. Since our launch we are quickly becoming one of the fastest growing brands in our niche. We scale through Meta ads 
/Instagram) across DTC and marketplaces and with our growing customer base, we are making sure to keep customer satisfaction at an all time high. 



We are looking for an A-player Senior Customer Service agent to take full ownership of our CS department and help us scale to the next level. This is a high-responsibility, high-autonomy role reporting directly to the founders.



Your Mission:



Own the customer service function end-to-end, ensuring our customers receive world-class support while driving key KPIs like response time and retention. Not only will we need you to be on top of your game and efficiently respond to tickets, we will also need you to keep an open mind on ways to innovate and improve our customer service systems. 



Responsibilities:



- Handle customer inquiries across
 and chat with speed, accuracy, and full ownership from first contact to resolution

- Manage order issues, refunds, returns, subscription changes, and product questions

- Use AI tools to assist with response drafting and ticket management, while reviewing all outputs before they reach a customer

- Identify patterns in customer issues and proactively flag them to the team

- Suggest improvements to AI prompts, response templates, and support workflows based on real interactions

- Maintain accurate records and follow SOPs consistently

- Escalate issues when necessary with clear, complete documentation — no half-baked handoffs

- Contribute ideas to improve the overall customer experience, not just close tickets



Our Tech Stack:



- Shopify

- Checkout Champ (subscriptions)

- 
 and WhatsApp for team comms



KPIs You Will Own:



- First Response Time: Under 24 hours

- Oldest Ticket: Under 1 day

- Chargeback thresholds within the acceptable range



What We're Looking For:



- Highly responsible — you do what you say you're going to do

- Sharp attention to detail with zero tolerance for sloppy work

- Self-sufficient and solutions-oriented — you figure it out

- Comfortable using AI tools and curious about how to make them better

- Clear, professional written communicator

- Calm under pressure and consistent in quality

- No ego — just results



Why Join Us:



- Fast-moving, no-bureaucracy environment where your work actually matters

- Real ownership of your role — we trust you to run it

- Work alongside AI tools at the forefront of how customer service is evolving

- Your ideas get heard and implemented, not buried in a suggestion box

- Remote, flexible, and built for people who deliver without being micromanaged

- Grow with a company that's scaling fast 



This Role Is Not For You If:



- You need constant supervision to stay on track

- Closing a ticket matters more to you than actually solving the problem

- You do the bare minimum and call it done

- Details slip through the cracks and you're okay with that

- You treat SOPs as suggestions

- You're not genuinely curious about AI and how to use it better

- You shut down under pressure instead of pushing through



Compensation & Details:



- $1,000+/month USD salary, depending on experience.

- Full-time, remote. Primary employment (no other jobs).



How to Apply:



If you're someone who takes full ownership, sweats the details, and genuinely takes pride in doing things right — we want to hear from you. This isn't a role for someone looking to punch the clock. This is for someone who sees a problem and fixes it, every single time.



To stand out, direct message me (Robert) a loom of you answering all the questions below.



QUESTIONS:



Q: How long have you been in a customer service role and what types of businesses or products have you supported?



Q: Describe a time you identified a recurring customer issue and took steps to fix it beyond just resolving the individual ticket.



Q: What AI tools have you used in a customer service context, and how did you use them to improve your workflow or output quality?



Q: A customer is threatening a chargeback over an issue that wasn't the company's fault. Walk me through exactly how you handle it.



Q: Describe a time you had to manage a high volume of tickets without letting quality slip. What did you do to stay on top of it?



Add any relevant work samples, SOPs you've built, or references (optional but recommended)

title: DROPSHIPPING EXPERT (AUTOMOTIVE PRODUCTS KNOWLEDGE IS PREFERRED)
description:
We are looking for a highly experienced Dropshipping Expert who understands the full dropshipping process — from sourcing winning products to validating and scaling them.



This role is focused on finding profitable, sellable products, especially in the automotive category (preferred), and ensuring they can perform in the market before launch.



Key Responsibilities

• Identify and source winning products from different suppliers:  direct suppliers, alibaba, aliexpress, and more.

• Analyze product demand, competition, and profitability 

• Validate products before launch (market research, competitor analysis, pricing strategy) 

• Ensure strong margins, reliable suppliers, and fast shipping options 

• Communicate and negotiate with suppliers for better pricing and terms 

• Test products and recommend which to scale or drop 

• Work with the marketing team to align product selection with ad strategy 

• Build and maintain a reliable supplier and product database 



Requirements

• Proven experience in dropshipping (REQUIRED) 

• Strong product research and sourcing skills 

• Experience working with Alibaba, AliExpress, and private/direct suppliers 

• Strong understanding of product validation and market demand 

• Knowledge of pricing strategy, margins, and fulfillment 

• Experience in automotive products is a plus 

• Analytical, detail-oriented, and results-driven 



Performance Expectations

• Consistently find profitable and scalable products 

• Validate products before launch to reduce risk 

• Maintain strong supplier relationships 

• Improve product success rate and overall store performance

title: AI Video Editor - Must be very experienced with VEO3, flow, and Higgsfield
description:
Gonna keep this short and sweet. We are looking for someone who knows how to use AI (VEO3) to make videos, at least a little bit. We can also train you, but you need to have a base understanding.



You will learn a lot and be working very closely with me and my co-founder.



We need someone who can work at least 40 hours per week for us. Must be ready to start today or tomorrow. No days off for the first 2 weeks except Sundays.



Our team is full of A-players. Very chill environment. If you do your job, we won't bother you.



Starting salary is $1,000 USD + performance bonuses. It'll go up as your role progresses.



TO APPLY, IT IS REQUIRED THAT YOU: attach a 3-5 minute loom introducing yourself, your goals, and talking about a bit of your past experience! (also include some links to past content you have made)

title: Accessibility Specialist (Documents / PDFs)
description:
This role requires advanced accessibility expertise and attention to detail, rather than general graphic design capability

alone. The specialist supports the remediation and production of complex documentation to meet WCAG 2.2 AA and PDF accessibility standards, ensuring outputs are compliant, usable, and fit for purpose.



Key Responsibilities

• Produce high-end, accurate finished art across complex, long-form financial services documentation.

• Create accessible interactive form PDFs using Adobe InDesign and Acrobat.

• Remediate existing documents to meet WCAG 2.2 AA and PDF accessibility standards.

• Apply and validate correct tagging, reading order, alt text, structure, and logical document flow.

• Conduct screen reader testing and accessibility validation.

• Ensure all documents meet compliance requirements within regulated environments.

• Liaise with IVE stakeholders to clarify briefs and accessibility requirements.

• Maintain exceptional attention to detail and technical accuracy.



Essential Skills & Experience

• Experience working within corporate brand guidelines and compliance frameworks.

• Advanced Adobe InDesign skills — complex layouts, long-form documents, print and digital production.

• Proven experience creating accessible interactive PDFs in InDesign and Acrobat.

• Strong working knowledge of WCAG 2.2 AA and PDF accessibility standards.

• Demonstrated experience remediating documents for accessibility compliance.

• Confident conducting screen reader testing and validating tagging, reading order, alt text and document structure.

• Experience working with regulated or financial services documentation highly regarded.



Accreditations & Desirable Skills

• Accessibility accreditations or formal accessibility certifications.

• Familiarity with Common Look PDF or other remediation tools.

• Proficiency in Microsoft Word and PowerPoint for document formatting.



***Work from home ready

***Amenable to work around 6AM-3PM //7 AM-4PM MNL time

***Comfortable using time tracker (time doctor app)



Interested applicants may send their most updated CV and portfolio. Apply now!

title: PIXEL & TRACKING SPECIALIST (Project-Based / Part-Time)
description:
PIXEL & TRACKING SPECIALIST (Project-Based / Part-Time)

We’re hiring a Pixel & Tracking Specialist who is obsessed with data integrity and attribution. This is a project-based role designed for the technical wizard who ensures that every click, lead, and conversion is tracked accurately across our entire marketing ecosystem.

If you understand that "you can’t scale what you can’t measure," then you are our person. You are here to bridge the gap between our ad platforms (Meta/Google) and our CRM (GoHighLevel), ensuring that our ROI reporting is bulletproof and our data flows seamlessly. Your priorities are attribution accuracy, server-side tracking (CAPI), and eliminating data blind spots.

—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.

--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!

What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM! 

Our Team Core Values:

DELIGHT THE CLIENT: We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

MASTER YOUR CRAFT: We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you get a dopamine hit when your "Test Events" fire perfectly in GTM? Do you have a deep understanding of browser-side vs. server-side tracking? Are you the person who finds the broken UTM parameter that everyone else missed? Do you take pride in creating clean, organized tracking environments that empower Media Buyers to scale with confidence?

Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!

Project Responsibilities:

Phase 1: Infrastructure Architecture & Audit

Perform a deep-dive audit of current Google Tag Manager (GTM) containers (Web & Server-side).

Configure/Verify Meta Pixel & Conversions API (CAPI) to achieve maximum event match quality.

Standardize GA4 configurations, including custom dimensions, lead-quality metrics, and enhanced measurement.

Phase 2: Attribution & CRM Integration

Implement a standardized UTM protocol across all channels to ensure 1:1 attribution within GoHighLevel.

Map "Deep Tracking" parameters to GHL custom fields to capture lead source, keyword, and campaign IDs.

Troubleshoot and close attribution gaps where "Direct/None" traffic is over-reporting.

Phase 3: Maintenance & Data Quality Assurance

Conduct regular "Health Checks" to ensure pixels aren't double-firing or failing due to site updates.

Resolve tracking issues caused by iOS privacy updates or browser cookie restrictions.

Build custom data visualizations (Looker Studio or GHL Dashboards) to show real-time CPL and ROAS.



Requirements:

EXPERT-level knowledge of Google Tag Manager (GTM), required.

Deep experience with Meta Conversions API (CAPI) and server-side tracking, required.

Proficiency in GA4 setup, debugging, and troubleshooting, required.

Familiarity with GoHighLevel tracking capabilities, hidden fields, and custom values, required.

Experience with Zapier or 
 for sending offline conversions or webhook data, required.

High attention to detail—you hate "dirty data" and unexplained discrepancies, required.

Strong English communication skills to explain technical "breaks" to the media buying team.

A stable, high-speed internet connection (at least 150mbps), required.

BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)

Experience with 3rd-party attribution tools (Hyros, Triple Whale, or SegMetrics).

Basic Javascript/HTML knowledge for custom tag firing.

SQL or BigQuery knowledge for advanced data analysis.

NOTE: This is a Project-Based / Part-Time role (5–15 hrs/week). We are looking for a specialist who can execute the initial infrastructure setup and provide ongoing maintenance/QA as we scale.



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1: Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.

As part of your application, include a Loom or YouTube video (2 minutes or less) explaining a complex tracking problem you solved and why you believe you’re the best fit for this role.



STEP 2: Qualified candidates may be invited to an interview.

STEP 3: Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). This will be the last step in the hiring process.

STEP 4: Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Pixel/Tracking SpecialistPIXEL & TRACKING SPECIALIST (Project-Based / Part-Time)

title: Mandarin Help Desk Support
description:
We're looking for a qualified Help Desk Support (Mandarin Speaker). The ideal candidate should have excellent Mandarin oral and written communication skills. This is for a full-time, work from home role. The Help Desk Support will be part of our team where they will be helping banks to assist their merchants. Assistance is needed for PCI certification of the merchants that help them against fraudulent attacks and other similar cases. Well-defined procedure is available for completion of work with the goal of delivering quality service both to banks and their merchants. We look for individuals who enjoy a challenge and mental exercise. This position is permanent work from home .



   Responsibilities:



-Respond to customer queries proficiently and professionally in consideration of quality expectations

-Attentively listen to each call and thoroughly read
s to probe what kind of assistance the customer requires

-Navigate through different applications and prepare information that is essential to remain on track during support

-Collaborate with the team and contribute to discussions on challenging queries

-Accurately update database and logs for seamless consolidation of the changes that ensue

-Understand that data are sensitive and unwarranted disclosure is avoided



Qualifications:



-Must be fluent in speaking and writing in the Mandarin Language

-A BPO Mandarin Customer Support experience is a plus

-Basic computer knowledge and can work with office applications and navigating the Internet

-Interpersonal skills that aid in problem-solving and knowledge-sharing

-Calmness and collectedness under pressure

-Accuracy and attention to detail

-Apt learning and understanding of foreign concepts

-Commitment to quality service based on customer's needs

-Has the ability to empathize with customer concerns

-Good at providing instructions

-Amenable to midshift/graveyard shift.

-Workplace should be conducive, free from background noise

title: Video Editor (Work From Home)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Video & Audio Editor to play a critical role in shaping the visual and auditory content of the Cybersecurity Marketing Society. This individual will be responsible for: 

Editing webinars and long videos into full-length videos 

Editing video content into captivating short clips 

Making creative videos formatted for social media

Podcast editing: Audio editing/sound design for podcasts

Editing our podcast episodes into video and short clips



This role requires a blend of technical skills, creativity, and a passion for cybersecurity, marketing, and digital content creation.



This role also requires the ideal candidate to: 

Communicate effectively in a digital environment

Track project progress on a shared project management system (Asana)

Use TimeDoctor to track hours

Teamwork: working well with the Society team and our other contractors (such as fellow audio/video editors) 

Meet deadlines



Responsibilities:

Edit recorded webinars into polished full-length videos and engaging short clips for various platforms.

Design and produce creative, compelling videos tailored for social media channels, including but not limited to LinkedIn,
, Instagram, TikTok, and
.

Collaborate with the content/writing/podcast team to develop video concepts that align with our marketing goals and audience interests.

Advise on the video specs for various platforms.

Manage and organize video and audio files efficiently.

Provide input on visual storytelling and help to storyboard ideas when necessary.

Experiment with styles and techniques, including the design of graphic elements in videos.

Apply audio editing skills for podcast content, ensuring clear, well-balanced sound across all episodes.

Stay up-to-date with the latest trends in video and audio production, editing software, and social media formats.

Participate in tea
etings, mostly in Eastern Time Zone (USA), and collaborate effectively with remote tea
mbers.

Requirements:

Proven experience in video editing with a strong portfolio showcasing your work.

Proficiency in professional video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects. 

Familiarity with graphic design software like Adobe Photoshop and Adobe Illustrator is a plus.

Basic knowledge of or willingness to learn audio editing, preferably with experience in Audacity or Adobe Audition.

Creative mindset with attention to detail and an eye for quality.

Excellent time-management skills and the ability to work on multiple projects simultaneously.

Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a remote setting.

Strong communication skills and proficiency in English.



Interest in or knowledge of cybersecurity topics or marketing topics is nice but not required.



  Tools & Software Knowledge (Preferred):

Adobe Premiere Pro (preferred)

Adobe After Effects

Adobe Photoshop (preferred)

Adobe Illustrator (preferred)

Audacity or Adobe Audition (willingness to learn)

title: Mindbody Technical Support  (Do not apply if you have no experience))
description:
We are looking for someone who has previously worked as a Technical Support in Mindbody.



This role is not for beginners — we need someone with hands-on experience who can confidently manage the Mindbody system and troubleshoot technical issues.



What you’ll do:



Provide technical support within Mindbody (resolve errors, assist users)

Manage schedules, services, memberships, and pricing

Assist with billing, payments, and account-related concerns

Troubleshoot integrations and syncing issues (e.g., payment gateways, third-party tools)

Maintain accurate client data, bookings, and transactions

Generate reports as needed



Requirements:



? MUST have prior experience working in Mindbody (technical support role)

? Strong knowledge of Mindbody backend (scheduling, memberships, reporting, etc.)

? Experience troubleshooting system issues and integrations

? Good English communication (written and verbal)

? Detail-oriented, reliable, and proactive

? Able to work independently



Role Details:



Remote (Philippines-based applicants preferred)

10 hours per week

Work schedule aligned with Australian Time (NSW)

Initial 3-month contract, with potential to become long-term



Rate:

AUD$10 – AUD$15 per hour (depending on experience)



To apply:

Please
 your resume to 
 and include:



Your experience using Mindbody

* Specific tasks you handled within the platform

* Examples of technical issues you’ve resolved

title: Virtual Assistant — Operations & Growth
description:
VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — OPERATIONS & GROWTH

Gold Coast Pool Inspections | Starts part-time, path to full-time | Remote | Australian business



ABOUT THE ROLE

We're a professional pool safety inspection business on the Gold Coast, Australia. We help homeowners, real estate agents, and property managers navigate pool compliance — clearly, efficiently, and without the confusion.



We're growing fast and need someone exceptional to help run the day-to-day operations behind the scenes. That's the core of this role. But we're also looking for someone who — if they have the interest and the skills — can help us grow through lead generation, outreach, and social media. The more the business grows, the faster this role becomes full-time.



This is not a role where you sit and wait to be told what to do. We want someone who sees what needs doing, does it, and finds better ways to get it done.



---



THE CORE JOB — OPERATIONS & ADMIN

This is your primary responsibility. Everything else is secondary to getting this right.



- Manage and schedule inspection jobs using our booking software (Formitize)

- Handle client
s — professionally, clearly, and on time

- Track job blockers and follow up with clients until resolved

- Organise documents in Google Drive with accuracy and consistency

- Process compliance certificates and coordinate with the QBCC pool register

- Support outreach to real estate agents and property managers

- Flag anything unusual and suggest improvements to how we operate

- Help build and maintain simple SOPs so nothing depends on memory



---



GROWTH OPPORTUNITY — IF YOU LOVE MARKETING, THERE'S MORE HERE FOR YOU



Once you're across the operations side, there's a real opportunity to take on a second lane: helping us grow the business through sales and marketing. This is optional, not required — but if this is your thing, we want to hear about it.



This is where someone with the right skills could genuinely accelerate their path to a full-time role.



- Lead generation and agent outreach (SMS,
, LinkedIn)

- Social media content — Instagram,
, Google Business

- Simple graphics and visual creatives (Canva or similar)

- Follow-up sequences for warm leads and past clients

- Expiry reminder campaigns to our existing client database

- Helping shape how we present the business online



You won't be thrown into this on day one. Operations first, always. But if you're ambitious and want to do more — the door is open.



---



THE GROWTH PATH

Months 1–2: Learn ops & systems

Months 2–4: Own your lane, add marketing (if of interest)

6+ months: Full-time operator & growth role



The timeline is driven by you. The faster you prove reliability, initiative, and results — the faster the role expands.



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Essential (everyone):

- Outstanding attention to detail

- Strong written English

- Self-driven — no micromanaging needed

- Comfortable with systems and SOPs

- Reliable and consistent

- Google Workspace proficient

- Calm under pressure



Bonus — marketing track:

- Canva or graphic design tools

- Social media content creation

-
 or SMS outreach experience

- Lead generation experience

- Instagram /
 / Google

- Copywriting or campaign ideas



---



WHO THRIVES HERE

The right person for this role takes pride in doing things properly. They don't just complete a task — they notice when something could be done better and they say so. They follow instructions precisely when learning, then bring their own thinking once they understand the system. They are the kind of person who builds a reputation for being the most reliable person on the team — and then quietly starts doing more than anyone asked.



---



HOW TO APPLY

Send a short message introducing yourself. Tell us:



1. Your relevant experience in admin or operations (briefly)

2. One example of when you caught a mistake or improved a process at work

3. If you have any marketing or creative experience — tell us what you've done

4. Your availability and your expected hourly rate



Applications without all four points will not be considered. We are looking for someone who reads instructions carefully — this is your first test.
